reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college is very good in education; there are fewer celebrations but good studies.

review_content.Placements: As it is a college of homoeopathy, the college provides placement in other colleges as professors, and most of the students do their own practice. The internship is provided in their own college. They guide the students to take placement in other countries as well, as they are providing us with further knowledge about going abroad. Students can earn at least 15,000–20,000 in the beginning.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many departments for all subjects. The college provides 100-student capacity A.C. classrooms with clinical rooms. The hostel has very nice facilities like A.C., and the mess has good quality food. The rooms have cupboard facilities with personal study tables.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: You will be studying in school not in college.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not so good. You can do private practice and government service chances are very low but you can work in a private hospital. I am working as a RBSk Medical officer in a Government but on a contractual basis. The starting salary is 25,000 Only, In Private Hospitals, Salary is on Hourly basis.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good and new building is made recently. Hostel is only for girl Students, Food is not in good quality otherwise all things are the best in Hostel. But you will feel like you are Studying in school not in college. You can't go out from the hostel except for Sunday and that is for only 2-3 hours, that's it.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: My college is very good, and includes a hospital.

review_content.Faculty: In our course, there is a CBDC course. It gives all type of knowledge is included in it. In this, we need 50% to pass at least. Every 3 months we have a viva exam that is a periodic assessment, and every 6 months we have a term test in which there is a theory exam as well as a viva exam.  It gives best faculty staff.
review_content.Other: My college is the best. No bad activities are done. It is the best college for overall development.

paragraphs: Pioneer Homoeopathic Medical College and Hospital admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG level in streams includingMedicine and Health Sciences.Pioneer Homoeopathic Medical College and Hospitaladmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asNEET and Gujarat NEET. Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 3,78,000for UG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses is 66 months.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar:

faqs.answer: A:    Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar is a well-known institution for MD, MS, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar has course specializations in Toxicology, Microbiology, Pathology, Biochemistry, Anatomy, Physiology, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Community Medicine.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar?

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar.

review_content.Placements: There will be no placements as like to be an engineering college. Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar, only provides internships for final-year students after completion of their Next Step 1 examination. The highest package offered in a private hospital is around 16 LPA. The lowest can be 6 LPA, and the average can be around 9 LPA. Top recruiting hospitals are Apollo Hospital, Global Hospital, and Star Hospital. 100 percent of students get into internships. Roles of a physician, diagnostic, and teacher are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college is well-equipped with mind-boggling infrastructure and well-experienced and trained faculty for students. There is availability of an e-library near the pathology department. A library with all textbooks of all years is available in it. The hostel is good as it got established in 2016. Rooms are good. There will be only common bathrooms for each floor. The quality of food is the worst by Nagireddy mess. Medical facilities are provided for emergencies by PG's in the college. Sports and games are conducted on the college grounds near the faculty apartments.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: My life carver,A beautiful college life.

review_content.Placements: The MBBS course has no placements like engineering colleges. There will be only an internship after the completion of the final year. A total of 175 students are placed each year. The highest package offered after the internship can be around 12 LPA. The lowest will be 5 LPA, with an average of around 9 LPA. 100 percent of students get internships in hospital facilities. Top roles include radiology and neurosurgery.
review_content.Infrastructure: Government Medical College Mahabubnagar has good facilities for the hostel, mess, and education infrastructure. There is a facility for a library and e-library, as well as air-conditioned classrooms for the comfort of students. Lab and demo rooms for each department are available. The quality of hostel rooms is good, as the college was established in 2016. The quality of food is average, and there is no canteen on the campus. There is a ground for games.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Well satisfied with both aspects of study and life (good environment).

review_content.Placements: It is not like placements. Mostly, 95% of the students directly clear final MBBS; the remaining 4% clear the exam through supplementary exams. Overall, 99% of students enter the internship. In the internship, the minimum package is 3.12 LPA. After the internship, by completing PG, they mostly get around 15 LPA, ranging from 10-20 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Separate lecture halls for all batches. Every department has its own labs and demo rooms. All the lecture halls are well-equipped with air conditioning. Both projectors and blackboards are available for both modes of teaching. Computer research labs are there. E-library and reading rooms are available for students. A big space for parking is also there. CCTV monitoring is provided for all lecture halls and floors.

review_summary.college_name: Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good environment and great faculty.

content.Placements: Our college has different courses like MBBS and paramedical courses like B.Sc. agriculture lab technician etc. In our class 22 batch MBBS, there are a total of 175 students MBBS course is for 4 and half years in college and 1 year of internship in a hospital. We have a good pass percentage in our college. This year only 2 students got distinctions in our state and one is from our college in 20 batches in university exams. We can do anything after this course there are many options like teaching and all.
content.Infrastructure: There are 4 lecture halls for each batch with central AC. There is a library with all medical books and e library with many computers. Wi-Fi and AC hostel are also okay environment is peaceful. There are many rooms. Food in the student's mess is not so good but we can adjust. There is Vijaya Dairy where we can get all milk products. Canteen is named S zone where we can get fast food and stationery. Everything is very affordable in canteen. There is a big ground for cricket, football, and all. There is a small court for volleyball and throwball.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college.

content.Placements: 100% of our batch mates got placements with a good and decent package. Our college provides 100% job security and everyone gets internships in our own hospital. We have top teachers so they teach well. They excel in their own departments so there is no tension for the quality of knowledge they provide to us.
content.Infrastructure: We have one of the best infrastructures in our state with high-speed Wi-Fi and projector classes. It has top-grade facilities. We have good hostels with neat and clean mess and top quality food. There is good ventilation in rooms.

There is a facility for a library and e-library, as well as air-conditioned classrooms for the comfort of students. Lab and demo rooms for each department are available. The quality of hostel rooms is good, as the college was established in 2016. The quality of food is average, and there is no canteen on the campus. There is a ground for games.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Well satisfied with both aspects of study and life (good environment).

content.Placements: It is not like placements. Mostly, 95% of the students directly clear final MBBS; the remaining 4% clear the exam through supplementary exams. Overall, 99% of students enter the internship. In the internship, the minimum package is 3.12 LPA. After the internship, by completing PG, they mostly get around 15 LPA, ranging from 10-20 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Separate lecture halls for all batches. Every department has its own labs and demo rooms. All the lecture halls are well-equipped with air conditioning. Both projectors and blackboards are available for both modes of teaching. Computer research labs are there. E-library and reading rooms are available for students. A big space for parking is also there. CCTV monitoring is provided for all lecture halls and floors.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Medical College, Mahabubnagar.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and library facilities are available at the college. Hostels are good because the college is only eight years old. Sports and gaming can be seen. reviews.review_heading: Everything is nice in my college. I love GMCM. It is the biggest achievement in my life.
reviews.review_text: Our college is well-equipped with up-to-date medical facilities, well-furnished classrooms, and a modern digital learning programme. Our college even has a clinical posting at the government hospital, so students can experience the subject matter in real life.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a library and an e-library. Study rooms are available in our college. The hostel rooms are spacious. The hostel was well-cleaned, well-ventilated, and well-lightened with 24/7 water, and power supply. Power supplies in summer are interrupted. The hostel weather is cool. Our college has a play area for indoor and outdoor games. A cricket field and throwball are available for boys. The badminton area is available for girls.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college is constructed recently. We have new college and hostel buildings that are constructed in the year 2016. We have the best fire safety arrangements everywhere. Classrooms are very spacious, and air-conditioners are available. Exam halls are good. The laboratory is available with all facilities. Our college has good maintenance as compared to other government colleges. We have a big cricket ground, volleyball court, badminton court, gym for boys and girls separately, table tennis, carr...

reviews.review_heading: This is the best medical college in Telangana, and teachers are friendly.
reviews.review_text: There is one large library and several books by various authors are available. Hostel monthly fee is Rs 1,500. In the hostel, one room is shared by 3 students, and it has one almira and one bed. Mess food is good, and its fee is Rs 3,000 per month. A canteen is also available. Our lecturers are doctors as they stay in our college quarters, so the medical facility is always available if required. Sports like cricket ground, volleyball court, football ground, table tennis, etc., are available in t...

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

Classrooms are very spacious, with an air conditioner, and we have both an e-library and physical library, with all kinds of textbooks and journals. The hostel is good, it is newly constructed, mess food is good, we have mess contractor basis, so that we can go for another contractor if we aren't satisfied with the food quality, sports and games happen, resources a...

reviews.review_heading: It is a superb medical college with all facilities, one of the best medical colleges in Telangana.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are wide and spacious, allowing easy seating for students. Labs are well-equipped. Library and E-library facilities are available (as per timings). Hostels are of high class. They even do have some emergency medical facilities. Mess is good with good hygiene measures and seating arrangements. Sports and gym facilities are available.

Sports ground is available for recreational purpose.

reviews_list.review_title: This college is very helpful for us, and it secures my future.

review_content.Placements: 65% of students are placed in our course. The average package is 3 LPA to 4 LPA. The lowest is nothing in our college but the highest package goes to 12 LPA. There is local company, and some companies have come to this college. Internship is not available in college. Some students get off campus internships. Roles offered are java developer, web developer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is very friendly environment in our college. But the college canteen and park are some issues. Our classroom or labs are very comfortable so we are not having any issues with them. It is provided only for girls, not for boys so I have no idea about the hostel facility. But I know about the hostel some information is that the environment is peaceful.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: This is my journey of my college, not a review.

review_content.Placements: My batch is 2023–2026 in Bachelor of Computer. Decent percentage of students are placed from the college. The highest package is 15 LPA and the average package is 3 to 4 LPA. MNC or IT companies come to lower college. Internships are provided, but students are mostly placed in our college, not in popular companies. Coding roles are the top roles in this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Nice environment in our college, especially the library and labs. I am a local guy, so I can’t take hostel or anything, but the T3 canteen is very suitable and open in nature. Food is awesome and tasty. The medical facility is very good. I went to check my body weight and the staff calculated my BMI. The staff is ordinary.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: In a simple word, my college is good for student which belongs to a middle class family.

review_content.Placements: From year 2023 when I got admission in the college. I am assured by the faculty members that you will definitely get college placement. But it's my third year, and there is no option for campus placement. As my dean said, I hope that within the next 15 to 20 days, there will be some placement opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of my college is decent. It has all the facilities that are required for the study like Wi-Fi, lab, classroom, smartrooms, and library. One more important thing is that my college provides timely awareness of all the requirements for being a good student or a good person, and they always support.

review_summary.college_name: Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The overall experience is very good. Gaining good quality knowledge and experience.

content.Placements: There are 65 percent of students placed from our course. The average package is 3 LPA- 4 LPA. The lowest is nothing in our college, but the highest package is 12 LPA. There is a local company, and some MNCs come to this college. Internships are not available in college. Some students are off-campus interns. Roles offered are Java developer, web developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There is a very friendly environment in our college, but the college canteen and park are some issues, our classroom and labs are very comfortable, so we do not have any issues with them. It is provided only for girls, not for boys, so I have no idea about the hostel facility. But I know about the hostel, some information is that the environment is picturesque.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college because of the good learning skills and helpful faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements are average. This college gives average placement. Few companies come and give low salary packages, but not according to the skills of students. The college does not provide internships.
content.Infrastructure: It has good infrastructure and good facilities. It consists of Wi-Fi labs with 2 labs having the maximum number of computers. It has a good mess (canteen). Air-conditioned classrooms are available in this college. It is an above-average college and good for skills development.
content.Faculty: This college has helpful teachers. They provide all the knowledge to students. This course is properly computer-based, so teachers provide good lab assessments to students and give quality education. Semester exams are very easy to pass, and out of 10 questions, we have to attempt only 5 questions.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: This college is very helpful for us, and it secures my future.

content.Placements: 65% of students are placed in our course. The average package is 3 LPA to 4 LPA. The lowest is nothing in our college but the highest package goes to 12 LPA. There is local company, and some companies have come to this college. Internship is not available in college. Some students get off campus internships. Roles offered are java developer, web developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There is very friendly environment in our college. But the college canteen and park are some issues. Our classroom or labs are very comfortable so we are not having any issues with them. It is provided only for girls, not for boys so I have no idea about the hostel facility. But I know about the hostel some information is that the environment is peaceful.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: This is my journey of my college, not a review.

content.Placements: My batch is 2023–2026 in Bachelor of Computer. Decent percentage of students are placed from the college. The highest package is 15 LPA and the average package is 3 to 4 LPA. MNC or IT companies come to lower college. Internships are provided, but students are mostly placed in our college, not in popular companies. Coding roles are the top roles in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Nice environment in our college, especially the library and labs. I am a local guy, so I can’t take hostel or anything, but the T3 canteen is very suitable and open in nature. Food is awesome and tasty. The medical facility is very good. I went to check my body weight and the staff calculated my BMI. The staff is ordinary.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: In a simple word, my college is good for student which belongs to a middle class family.

content.Placements: From year 2023 when I got admission in the college. I am assured by the faculty members that you will definitely get college placement. But it's my third year, and there is no option for campus placement. As my dean said, I hope that within the next 15 to 20 days, there will be some placement opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of my college is decent. It has all the facilities that are required for the study like Wi-Fi, lab, classroom, smartrooms, and library. One more important thing is that my college provides timely awareness of all the requirements for being a good student or a good person, and they always support.

cut_off.college_name: Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari Campus Cutoff 2025: Check UPTAC Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari Campus cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari Campus UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari Campus cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari Campus BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 520157 and 1341021 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competitio

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 520157 for the general HS quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 1069937 in 2023 and 277893 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering demonstrated fluctuating trend.

Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari Campus accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari Campus can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

As the Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari Campus UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. Students can refer to the table below to find the Round 1 and Last Round closing cutoff ranks for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations available at Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari Campus.
In this section, students can see UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations.

For 2025, in the last round, the top three most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.E. in Mechanical Engineering, followed by B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, and B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with the closing ranks of 447024, 690231 and , respectively.

For admission to Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari Campus for B.E. / B.Tech students have to clear the UPTAC exam and attain valid ranks to qualify for a seat at this institute. Students can see the table below to know the important dates for admission to Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Agra - Khandari Campus.

reviews.review_heading: The overall experience is very good. Gaining good quality knowledge and experience.
reviews.review_text: There is a very friendly environment in our college, but the college canteen and park are some issues, our classroom and labs are very comfortable, so we do not have any issues with them. It is provided only for girls, not for boys, so I have no idea about the hostel facility. But I know about the hostel, some information is that the environment is picturesque.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college because of the good learning skills and helpful faculty members.
reviews.review_text: It has good infrastructure and good facilities. It consists of Wi-Fi labs with 2 labs having the maximum number of computers. It has a good mess (canteen). Air-conditioned classrooms are available in this college. It is an above-average college and good for skills development.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very helpful for us, and it secures my future.
reviews.review_text: There is very friendly environment in our college. But the college canteen and park are some issues. Our classroom or labs are very comfortable so we are not having any issues with them. It is provided only for girls, not for boys so I have no idea about the hostel facility. But I know about the hostel some information is that the environment is peaceful.

reviews.review_heading: This is my journey of my college, not a review.
reviews.review_text: Nice environment in our college, especially the library and labs. I am a local guy, so I can’t take hostel or anything, but the T3 canteen is very suitable and open in nature. Food is awesome and tasty. The medical facility is very good. I went to check my body weight and the staff calculated my BMI. The staff is ordinary.

reviews.review_heading: In a simple word, my college is good for student which belongs to a middle class family.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of my college is decent. It has all the facilities that are required for the study like Wi-Fi, lab, classroom, smartrooms, and library. One more important thing is that my college provides timely awareness of all the requirements for being a good student or a good person, and they always support.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IET College Khandari Agra.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average, not very vast. There are 2 playgrounds where outside players play all day, so very rarely do you get a free ground. The hostel is only for girls. Boys have to stay near the college on room rent or in PG hostels, or they can also stay in private boys’ hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Placement and career growth are very bad.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are only available for girls, not for boys. Boys have to live in the nearest places to the college. Basically, boys can rent a house or stay in a PG. The infrastructure is okay. At one time, they teach almost 80-90 students in a big hall, but sometimes the voice can't reach the last bench.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about college.
reviews.review_text: My college has all the labs for research and all types of support for labs, and it has outer facilities for research, and it is a good college. I got a hostel in my first year. The hostel and mess are good, but due to personal reasons, I left the hostel and took a 2bhk flat on rent outside the college for Rs. 4500 and the electricity bill.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: I didn't avail it, but I used to go there, and everything was good. The food, accommodation, and cleanliness were good, and it was better than others in the budget. They also provided medical and Wi-Fi facilities. I got a hostel in the first year, which was good, and the mess was also good, but due to personal reasons, I left the hostel and took a 2BHK flat on rent outside the college for Rs. 4,500 plus the electricity bill.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: All the hostels are considered livable, and any normal student can survive on mess food. Apart from this, the university campus area is full of many affordable private options such as PGs, rented rooms, private hostels, and many cheap lunch homes which provide good food at nominal rates.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: I got a hostel room in the first year. The hostel was good, and the mess was also good, but due to personal reasons, I left the hostel and rented a 2BHK flat outside the college for Rs. 4,500 plus the electricity bill.

reviews.review_heading: It is providing solutions based on concerns. It is good at arranging needs.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are fitted with modern projectors, considering their frequency of usage. Only for the students of the civil department, it arranges individual desks and provides comfortable sketching of diagrams. Likewise, required facilities are arranged for all departments based on their needs.

reviews.review_heading: The college is located in the main area of the city.
reviews.review_text: The college is located in the midst of the city, so we are often stuck in traffic and delayed in reaching the college on time. Students are supposed to use the college transportation systems. The college is supported with uninterrupted power connections and Wi-Fi connections.

reviews.review_heading: Bachelor of commerce at khandari campus, Agra.
reviews.review_text: The campus would have given me tons of memories, yet it had some drawbacks. The management instantly made some decisions, finalized and implemented them immediately. Events are instantly planned and conducted by the management without giving any notice to the students for preparation.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is very good. It has a 24-hour water and electricity supply. The environment is very good. Only mess charges are paid by students every month and it is very cheap. The mess bill is around Rs. 3,000 per month and food quality is normal. The mess provides 2 types of vegetables and 1 type of dal, including chapati and price. The college focuses mostly on practical learning in clinical subjects rather than paying attention to para-clinicals and non-clinicals. The college assigns ...

faqs.answer: A:    Overall seats across various courses at Banarsidas Chandiwala Institute of Physiotherapy goes up to 60. Banarsidas Chandiwala Institute of Physiotherapy offers a UG Degree course in Medicine & Health Sciences. The course is available in Full Time mode.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is well located with easy commuting facilities, a good library and expert teachers.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell keeps us updated with various vacancies and job opportunities. Our college offers placements in well-reputed hospitals. We are provided with opportunities to be a part of reputed hospitals and get to know more about the field of physiotherapy.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is well constructed and well spacious. Classrooms are well ventilated and well spacious. Laboratories are equipped with all the latest facilities and equipment related to the course. The library has most of the latest books related to the course.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with faculty members, infrastructure and transportation.

review_content.Placements: About 100% of the students who apply for placements get placed in various reputed companies like Capri, Optum UnitedHealth, etc., with an average salary package of 3.5 LPA. Every student gets placed in multiple hospitals such as Max, Apollo, Fortis, LNJP, etc., throughout the year in different departments, especially in the 4th year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is above average here, with completely air-conditioned classrooms. There are smart classrooms with projectors and computers. There is a well-maintained library and different labs such as anatomy, physiology, electro, exercise, biomechanics and OPD with all the machines and equipment needed for treatment. Though I didn't have any experience of the hostel, I have heard that the rooms are huge enough with good food.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with college and teachers. Everyone is helpful throughout my graduation.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell is helpful, and it always keeps us updated regarding various vacancies. Various companies like Optum are visiting here to offer jobs. All students get chances for clinical posting during their studies in various private and government hospitals. All students are well-placed for internships too.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library has all the required and related books. OPD is also equipped with all required basic physiotherapy equipment and modalities. Laboratories have the basic equipment for practical knowledge. Our college premises has Wi-Fi and a computer lab, and classrooms are also digitalised and air-conditioned.

review_summary.college_name: Banarsidas Chandiwala Institute of Physiotherapy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college for physiotherapy in Delhi.

content.Placements: College contains a placement cell which is responsible for placements of students and also sends the students to various hospitals for internships and clinical training. Some students are working in AIIMS Delhi as physiotherapists, and some are also working in research centres and rehab centres.
content.Infrastructure: The campus of the college is not too large, but it has all the facilities required. The college has an anatomy lab, a physiology lab, a sports lab, a research lab, a musculoskeletal lab, and a library. The classes are large enough and all the classes contain ACs and smart boards for teaching. It also has a library in which all books related to the course are available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with our college because of its good faculty members, placements, facilities, etc.

content.Placements: Physiotherapy is a four and a half years course including 6 months compulsory internship. The placement rate of our college is great. The average salary package offered is around 5 LPA-7 LPA, depending on the knowledge and skills of the physiotherapist. Students get recruited in many hospitals like AIIMS Safdarjung, Lady Hardinge, Apollo, Max, etc. All the students are interned from our college.
content.Infrastructure: As our college is situated just near to Govindpuri metro station, it is very convenient to reach there. Classrooms, labs and libraries are well air-conditioned. Our college has general and private OPD to gain practical knowledge. Students can practice manual therapy techniques, application of modalities, etc. Students are made to observe the patient under the guidance of teachers just after completing their 1st year to gain skills and confidence to treat patients. There is no Wi-Fi facility for students. Labs and libraries are well-equipped with sufficient books and study materials. Our college issues the bones and other study materials to students so that they can study at their home also if they can't buy them. There are separate hostels for boys and girls. The food provided in the mess and canteen is healthy and nutritious for hostellers and outsiders. Our college also shows immense interest in sports and games as it is related to our course also.

highlights.summary: Admission to the HNBUMU Dehradun is now open for the year 2025. Interested candidates must visit the official website of the University and apply for the same.

college_info.intro:
HNBUMU Uttarakhand offers courses such as BSc, MBBS, and BPT as some of the popular ones in full-time mode. The University offers respective courses for durations varying from 3 years to 5.5 years. Admission to the respective courses is offered based on merit and entrance. For courses such as MBBS, candidates must qualify for NEET, whereas for other courses, candidates must qualify for the exams suggested (if any) by the University during admissions.
Furthermore, Hemwati Nandan Bahuguna Uttarakhand Medical Education University faculty designs the curriculum as per the norms provided by the recognising/ approving bodies. By the end of the term, graduates receive placement opportunities laid out by the University's partnerships and collaborations. For more details around Hemwati Nandan Bahuguna Uttarakhand Medical Education University popular programmes, check out the table below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Hemwati Nandan Bahuguna Uttarakhand Medical Education University offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Science and Nursing. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Sc., MBBS and BPT. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Hemwati Nandan Bahuguna Uttarakhand Medical Education University offers M.Sc., MD and MS. The fees for Hemwati Nandan Bahuguna Uttarakhand Medical Education University courses range between INR 1,80,000 to 15,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Government Doon Medical College, Dehradun, has amazing faculty members and a course curriculum.

review_content.Placements: We have a batch of 150 students per year in the Government Doon Medical College. Mostly, students at the end of the course give NEET PG exams, and out of which a handful of students clear NEET PG in their first attempt. There is no concept of placements in the medical college. Students can just give an interview for the post of MO, i.e., medical officer. The paid internship is mandatory at the end of the course in order to provide exposure to students.

overview_faqs.question: How safe is the HNBUMU campus for students?
overview_faqs.answer: Hemwati Nandan Bahuguna Uttarakhand Medical Education University resides within the lush greens of Dehradun and offers a safe and well-guarded premises. The University accomodates majority of facilities and well-equipped technologically advanced establishment. Recognised by UGC, HNBUMU Dehradun has an infrastructure built as per the norms laid by the recognising bodies.

review_summary.college_name: HNBUMU Dehradun Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is good enough to take admission.

content.Placements: About 70 to 80 students from our batch got placed through college placement support or campus drive. The highest package is around 4-5 LPA, and the average package is 2.5-3 LPA. They offer placement in a top hospital. Around 85-95% students got an internship.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good facilities like clean classroom well-equipped lab, Wi-Fi campus, and a library with useful books. The hostel rooms are comfortable, and the mess food is decent and hygienic. Medical help, sports ground, and indoor games are also available for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is good enough to take admission.

content.Placements: 70 to 80 percent of students get placed in the course. The highest package offered ranges from 5-6 LPA. Around 52-70 percent of students get internship opportunities during the course. Students are usually offered entry-level roles such as system junior executive, physiotherapist, and sports clinical therapist.
content.Infrastructure: The department has good facilities for students. Classrooms are clean, well-ventilated, and have proper seating arrangements. The department provides fire extinguishers, which are useful for study and research work. Laboratories are well-maintained. The hostel facilities are decent and suitable for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Government Doon Medical College, Dehradun, has amazing faculty members and a course curriculum.

content.Placements: We have a batch of 150 students per year in the Government Doon Medical College. Mostly, students at the end of the course give NEET PG exams, and out of which a handful of students clear NEET PG in their first attempt. There is no concept of placements in the medical college. Students can just give an interview for the post of MO, i.e., medical officer. The paid internship is mandatory at the end of the course in order to provide exposure to students.
content.Infrastructure: The college has well-equipped labs, but without Wi-Fi. The library has all the necessary books. Classrooms are well-equipped with a smart board, whiteboard, and blackboard. The mess food is awful. The hostel office carries all the first aid equipment and medicines. The college has a basketball ground, volleyball, tennis, badminton court, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good and nice college.

content.Placements: The percentage of students in the BBA department is 80%. The highest package for the course is 8 to 10 LPA. Parle company offers internships and has good packages after placement for the future, making families happy. They are providing more experience after joining the job, along with good positions.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for courses have many things to gain knowledge, including all types of labs, smart classrooms, and a library. I don’t know about the hostel because I am not living in college, but my friends tell me that the hostel has good facilities and serves good food.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Decent college with scope.

content.Placements: Around 70-75% of students got placed. The average package was 3-4 LPA, the lowest 2-2.5 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Accenture, and roles like Software Engineer, Analyst, and Support Executive were offered. Good placements with average packages.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has good classrooms, labs, a library, and Wi-Fi facilities. Hostels are decent with average mess food, basic medical support, and sports facilities for indoor and outdoor games. The campus environment is friendly with decent events and connectivity, but more practical exposure and industry interaction would be helpful.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in HNBUMU without NEET?
faqs.answer: Admission to majority of courses at HNBUMU Dehradun Uttarakhand is offered on the basis of merit and entrance. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 and graduation for admission to UG and PG level courses. However, for admission to majority of courses, the University considers NEET/ NEET MDS/ Uttarakhand NEET and other equivalent examination.

faqs.question: Can I get into HNBUMU with 85%?
faqs.answer: Hemwati Nandan Bahuguna Uttarakhand Medical Education University offers admission based on merit and entrance. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 40% to 60% in Class 12 for UG level admissions. Whereas, for PG level admissions, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% to 55% in graduation. Considering the percentage for merit, candidates with 85% have a convenience of seeking admission by clearing first round of selection. However, for the further process, candidates must qualify remaining selection rounds.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for HNBUMU admission?
faqs.answer: Hemwati Nandan Bahuguna Uttarakhand Medical Education University courses are offered in UG and PG level across several fields in full-time mode. Admission to the respective courses is offered based on merit and entrance exams. Therefore, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 and graduation for admission to UG and PG level courses. Furthermore, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams.

faqs.question: Is admission to HNBUMU merit-based or entrance-based?
faqs.answer: HNBUMU Dehradun offers admission to UG and PG level courses in full-time mode on the basis of merit and entrance. For final admission, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams for the course of choice. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 and graduation for UG and PG level admissions.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by MIET Kumaon, HaldwaniReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: College is good enough to take admission.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good facilities like clean classroom well-equipped lab, Wi-Fi campus, and a library with useful books. The hostel rooms are comfortable, and the mess food is decent and hygienic. Medical help, sports ground, and indoor games are also available for students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by MIET Kumaon, HaldwaniReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good enough to take admission.
reviews.review_text: The department has good facilities for students. Classrooms are clean, well-ventilated, and have proper seating arrangements. The department provides fire extinguishers, which are useful for study and research work. Laboratories are well-maintained. The hostel facilities are decent and suitable for students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Government Doon Medical College, DehradunReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Government Doon Medical College, Dehradun, has amazing faculty members and a course curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-equipped labs, but without Wi-Fi. The library has all the necessary books. Classrooms are well-equipped with a smart board, whiteboard, and blackboard. The mess food is awful. The hostel office carries all the first aid equipment and medicines. The college has a basketball ground, volleyball, tennis, badminton court, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by MIET Kumaon, HaldwaniReviewed on 16 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is a very good and nice college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for courses have many things to gain knowledge, including all types of labs, smart classrooms, and a library. I don’t know about the hostel because I am not living in college, but my friends tell me that the hostel has good facilities and serves good food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by MIET Kumaon, HaldwaniReviewed on 14 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Decent college with scope.
reviews.review_text: The campus has good classrooms, labs, a library, and Wi-Fi facilities. Hostels are decent with average mess food, basic medical support, and sports facilities for indoor and outdoor games. The campus environment is friendly with decent events and connectivity, but more practical exposure and industry interaction would be helpful.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by MIET Kumaon, HaldwaniReviewed on 13 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: A good college for basic learning, with scope for self-improvement and skill development.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are satisfactory, with Wi-Fi, computer labs, classrooms, and a library. Hostel and mess facilities are good and manageable. Basic medical facilities and sports facilities (like cricket, football, volleyball, and indoor games such as badminton and chess) are available on campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by MIET Kumaon, HaldwaniReviewed on 13 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I am very disappointed with a few teachers and the registrar.
reviews.review_text: The campus has Wi-Fi with 100 kbps speed, giving a completely remote-life experience as there is no mobile signal available. Classrooms are the best possible according to the fee. There are many computers in the lab, but not all of them work. We have to find a working system and then start working. If you are lucky, it may work. Otherwise, it hangs or stops in between, which makes you hardworking because you have to do all your work again from the beginning. You also get nice medical facilities...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by MIET Kumaon, HaldwaniReviewed on 13 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college has really good placements.
reviews.review_text: Labs and libraries are very attractive. Classrooms make the environment cozy and comfortable for studying. The mess and canteen food are delicious. If students suffer from sickness, there are good medical facilities. Every year, there is a great annual sports week to motivate the students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by MIET Kumaon, HaldwaniReviewed on 13 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Review of MIET Kumaon, Haldwani.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi is available on campus. Lab exposure is decent. Hostel rooms and food are average. Toilet conditions are poor. The warden, sir, is understanding. There is no outing permission, and the GATE pass approval procedure is very long. There is no proper availability of hot water for the entire batch during the winter.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by MIET Kumaon, HaldwaniReviewed on 12 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Best part of the college is the nursing department.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good. The computer lab is very nice, and the classrooms are very good. The canteen is very huge. Medical facilities are also good. Sports and games events also happen every week. The quality of food is good, and the best part of the canteen is the roll.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by MIET Kumaon, HaldwaniReviewed on 8 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good college for BPT, very supportive faculty and teachers, and nice infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructural facilities are very well-equipped and maintained, with a clean and green campus. Ample classrooms and labs are available along with a large library. In the library, many books related to the students' respective courses are provided, and computers with internet facilities are also available for the use of students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by MIET Kumaon, HaldwaniReviewed on 3 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, strong academics, and industry-ready education with scope.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure to support the course. It provides students with a strong Wi-Fi connection, well-equipped laboratories, and spacious classrooms that help students learn effectively and efficiently. We love to study with things that help us engage in studies.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by MIET Kumaon, HaldwaniReviewed on 31 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure are available for the B.Sc. nursing course. There are well equipped labs, classrooms with smart boards, and a library. It provides a variety of books related to the course. Good-quality food is available in the canteen and mess. Medical facilities are average. Sports activities are conducted every year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by MIET Kumaon, HaldwaniReviewed on 31 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: We have a very helpful teacher and good placements in 2024, good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, and all facilities are available. They are important for college, we have all nursing facilities, like a fundamental lab, a nutrition lab, a pediatric lab, and all facilities that are initially for nursing college. They provide good quality food in the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by MIET Kumaon, HaldwaniReviewed on 31 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I love my college. It is very best.
reviews.review_text: In our course, the facilities, according to our subject and syllabus, are very good. All lab available in our college like anatomy, paediatrics, fundamentals, and nutrition. The hostel facility in our college is better and clean and the food provided in the mess is too good. Canteen also clean and hygiene ic, every saturday is sports day and we will enjoy every sport.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Very good and accurate college.

review_content.Placements: This college placement is good, but the main point depends on you and your knowledge. Your placement depends on your knowledge and your work. The main thing is that the college gives you the opportunity for placement. If you can do the job, then they will select you.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided are good, like proper classroom conditions, good labs, and all the equipment available in our college. Hostel conditions are good and available at a minimal cost.
review_content.Faculty: Our college faculty is the best because they teach like a friend and understand the students’ problems, where they get confused, and how to solve their problems. The exam schedule is not good because sometimes we are surprised to see the datasheet of exam. My course is B.Pharma, and this course is good for a good future and life survival.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Enjoyed the events, but placements could be better. Peaceful campus with good facilities.

review_content.Placements: Around 90 percent of students in my course are placed through campus placements. The highest package is 9 LPA and the lowest package is 2 LPA. The average package stood at 4 LPA. Some of the top companies that hire from our course include TCS Infosys Wipro Accenture Capgemini Deloitte and more. Some of the common job roles are software developer business analyst data analyst project coordinator and sales/marketing.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities available in our classrooms include Wi Fi labs a library a water cooler and A/C. The quality of facilities in our hostel is also good. The rooms are clean and of decent size, usually shared by 2 or 3 students. Wi-Fi is available in the hostels as well. There is a 24/7 supply of water and electricity with backup support. The quality of food available in the mess is good, and the medical facilities are very good. For sports, there are outdoor grounds for cricket, football, volleyball, etc. Indoor games like table tennis, carrom, and chess are also available. Some hostels or campuses even have a gym with basic equipment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Average college.

content.Placements: Mainly, all students are placed, but some are not placed due to low CGPA and do not fulfill the criteria of the company. Mainly, students got placed in the Chetu company for a software engineer role with an average package of 3 LPA to 5LPA. Major sales companies come, and also some tech or good companies come.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very bad, and Wi-Fi is good in classrooms but bad in the hostel. The labs and library are average. The hostel facility is the worst, and the behavior of the warden is very bad. I never suggest that you go to a hostel, and the food is also very bad, and many times, a chair or an insect is found in the food.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Accurate college is good. This college is worth your money.

content.Placements: 50 percent of the pharmacy students got placed. If they have knowledge, the average package offered is 4 LPA. Many companies come to this college. Jubilant Life Sciences offers a good package for students of the Accurate College of Pharmacy and offers a 4 LPA package.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average, and the classrooms are average. In the hostel, the food is bad, but everything else is good. Whenever I go to our friend's room in the hostel, they always say hostel life is good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are highly knowledgeable and helpful. They understand the students according to the students' capacity and help accordingly in the course of B. Pharm. The study is hard every semester, has different challenges, and 50 percent is the passing percentage. The faculty is good in this college.

admission_overview.title: Accurate Group of Institutions Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Accurate Group of Institutions admission to courses is primarily entrance-based. The institute accepts various national-level entrance exams to shortlist candidates for admission to various AGI courses. For instance, candidates seeking admission to the PGDM course are required to have a valid scorecard of CAT/ MAT/ XAT/ ATMA/ CMAT/ GMAT. The application forms for the Accurate Group of Institutions course admission are released online on the official website of the Institute. Accurate Group of Institutions offers more than ten courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. Candidates will have the option to select a course from a wide variety of streams such as management, Engineering, Law, Architecture, Pharmacy, and Computer Applications. Most of the AGI courses are approved by AICTE and offered in affiliation with AKTU.

Class 12 or diploma in PCM with a minimum 50% marks

admission_process.title: Accurate Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Accurate Group of Institutions admission processis online. The step-wiseAGI admission processis given below:
1- Registration Process 2025

Contenders must register themselves with the institute in order to apply for admission. The application forms are released on the official website of the Accurate Group of Institutes. Students have to register using a valid email ID and phone number. It must be filled out carefully by the candidate before the last date.
2- Selection Criteria
Students selection based on their performance on the entrance exam. Contenders have to upload valid scorecards during the application process.
3- Admission call and confirmation of seat
If they clear all the criteria, they are selected and informed via email or call. Shortlisted students are required to pay the admission confirmation fee to book their seats.

hostel_campus.college_name: Accurate Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 15 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Average college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very bad, and Wi-Fi is good in classrooms but bad in the hostel. The labs and library are average. The hostel facility is the worst, and the behavior of the warden is very bad. I never suggest that you go to a hostel, and the food is also very bad, and many times, a chair or an insect is found in the food.

reviews.review_heading: Accurate college is good. This college is worth your money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average, and the classrooms are average. In the hostel, the food is bad, but everything else is good. Whenever I go to our friend's room in the hostel, they always say hostel life is good.

reviews.review_heading: Very good and accurate college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided are good, like proper classroom conditions, good labs, and all the equipment available in our college. Hostel conditions are good and available at a minimal cost.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 28 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Enjoyed the events, but placements could be better. Peaceful campus with good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in our classrooms include Wi Fi labs a library a water cooler and A/C. The quality of facilities in our hostel is also good. The rooms are clean and of decent size, usually shared by 2 or 3 students. Wi-Fi is available in the hostels as well. There is a 24/7 supply of water and electricity with backup support. The quality of food available in the mess is good, and the medical facilities are very good. For sports, there are outdoor grounds for cricket, football, volleybal...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 15 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is worthy and it will give us the best result in our final year.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very nice especially labs are so amazing. Hostel rooms are up to date and the mess food is quite better than other hostels. The campus provides a very nice field to play. It provides a gym facility by which students' health gets very nice.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 22 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty and active campus life, average infrastructure, moderate placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus has a decent infrastructure. Classrooms are equipped with whiteboards but no air conditioning. The labs are adequately maintained, and the library has a good collection of books. Wi-Fi is available but can be slow during peak hours. Hostels are average. The rooms are fine but basic, and the messy food is average. The canteen is functional, with limited variety. Medical facilities are available, but basic. Sports facilities include a ground and a few indoor games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 21 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Basically college is decent but not best.
reviews.review_text: Not living in the hostel but as per students living in the hostel is not that good, that is decent. Overall, infrastructure is okay. So you might prefer another hostel too. There are many options in the hostel here so it's not a problem.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 30 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good and placement is also good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course/ department are good. In our college, a high-speed Wi-Fi network is available. On our campus, good labs are also available. On our campus, good and neat and clean classrooms are available, and a good library is available. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 17 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college review. From my side, the overall rating of the college is average.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are not up to the mark in the college. Some are very old and need maintenance, so they are just average. Wi-Fi is not available in the college. Facilities in the hostel are also very average and not comparable to the fee.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 6 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A good college according to the fees.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average considering the fees, which is Rs.1,35,000 per year. The hostel facility is not very good but is manageable. The food is sometimes half-cooked, but the main issue is the hostel warden. Our college has three well maintained canteens providing quality food and a good dining experience. The college atmosphere is lush green, surrounded by beautiful gardens and parks, creating a peaceful and refreshing environment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 1 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college review. I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: The college campus provides all types of facilities, such as Wi-Fi, projectors in classrooms, and libraries, and comfortable desks and seating. I am not a hosteller, but I know that the hostel in our college is decent, and the food is also decent. I eat there sometimes. The mess is huge. The medical facilities are available both in the hostel and on campus. Sports and games are also played on campus, like basketball, football, badminton, volleyball, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 1 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College life is the best life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is awesome and well-structured. Each department has a different building, so we can find out easily. In every hostel, the food quality is average. Sports and games are always done on our campus as many colleges come to participate. If they win, they will get prizes.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 31 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with my college because infrastructure and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are fully digital including biometrics attendance and smart board facilities. Hostel are generally considered good. Food in mess is great sometimes it includes dessert and fast food also. Mess keeps raising prices, like the cost of brown rice.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Accurate Institute of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 31 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good and bad things about Accurate Institute of Management & Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my course is below average. It has just a simple infrastructure, not so attractive and even not good. Labs are really so bad. Classrooms of my course are like school. The library is not available for anyone and they just say that the library is open 24x7 but it is not real at all. Hostel infrastructure is below average, and no one likes it. The food in the hostel mess is very bad. Food is like animals food, and they think we are animals. There is no medical facility. Games ...

reviews.review_heading: The average package is 4 LPA, so it is good.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi and network are okay, and the classrooms are quite good. The library is better for preparation and also to spend time to study purposes. The labs are also good, and we go there twice or thrice a week. The hostel is good, with better food, and the better rooms are supportive friends and roommates. Sports are usually played unofficially and officially by us, and the canteen is just in front of our hostel.

admission_process.title: WGSHA Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Welcomgroup Graduate School of Hotel Administration offers a list of courses at the undergraduate and postgraduate levels. At the UG level,WGSHAManipal offers a BA in Culinary Arts and a Bachelor of Hotel Management (BHM) courses for a duration of three and four years, respectively. WGSHA offers MSc in Dietetics & Applied Nutrition, an MA in Indian Cuisine and Food Culture and a Master of Hotel Management courses at the PG level for two years each.
Manipal 2025 Applications Open|Apply Now

Welcomegroup Graduate School of Hotel Administration (WGSHA) invites applications for the session 2025. This institution offers multiple courses at the UG and PG levels. The institute runs five major programs at the UG as well as the PG levels, namely, BA, BHM, MSc, MA, and MHMCT. Eligible candidates need to apply online using the link given below on the official website. The process of selection therefore involves meeting those academic requirements and participating in corresponding selection rounds. More highlights are mentioned below:

The institute offers a plethora of courses including BHM, BA, MSc, MA, MHMCT, etc. Candidates wanting to pursue a course from the college can fill out the respective course application form. Candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria for WGSHA admissions to various UG & PG courses, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related toWGSHA courses:
Step 1: WGSHA Admission Process 2025

The first step in the admission process is to fill out the application form. Candidates can visit the official website to apply for the interested course and after the completion of the form, the last step is to pay the application fee and proceed for submission.
Step 2:WGSHA Selection Process

The registered students are required to appear for the examination on the selected date. The results will be intimated to candidates via email or candidates can check their results through the official website.
Step 3: WGSHA Seat Allotment
Candidates who have cleared the entrance exam will be considered for admission. The selected students are required to pay the admission fee to confirm their seats with respective time/deadlines.

faqs.question: What is the admission process of Welcomgroup Graduate School of Hotel Administration?
faqs.answer: To get admission into Welcomgroup Graduate School of Hotel Administration (WGSHA), Manipal, candidates seeking undergraduate (UG) courses must pass the Higher Secondary Examination and undergo a Department Test (DT), followed by two interviews (Panel Interview and Personal Interview). For postgraduate (PG) courses, candidates need a relevant bachelor's degree, and admission is based on their performance in the Department Test

faqs.question: How to get into WGSHA Manipal?
faqs.answer: In order to enter into Welcomgroup Graduate School of Hotel Administration (WGSHA), Manipal, all candidates have to qualify themselves in the Manipal Entrance Test (MET) for any undergraduate courses, including courses like BHM and BA in Culinary Arts. Postgraduate classes are strictly merit-based with regard to candidates' qualifications in their previous last qualifying examinations. Finally, short-listed students at both the above-mentioned courses may also face an interview. The eligibility criteria include passing some relevant exams, such as a Class 12 exam. For more information, visit the original WGSHA site.

faqs.question: How to get admission to WGSHA BHM course?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to the Welcomgroup Graduate School of Hotel Administration BHM course must visit the institute's official website to apply online. WGSHM BHM admission is based on candidates' performance in the Manipal Entrance Test (MET).

faqs.question: What is the entrance exam for Welcomgroup Graduate School of Hotel Administration?
faqs.answer: The entrance examination to join Welcomgroup Graduate School of Hotel Administration is Manipal Entrance Test. It has to be taken for getting admission in Undergraduate Courses like BHM and BA in WGSHA. It has four parts- English, General Knowledge & Current Events, Numerical Ability, and Reasoning. It requires the candidate to have passed class 10 or class 12 or equivalent with subjects like Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry.

placement_report.college_name: WGSHA Manipal Placements 2025: Highest & Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: WGSHA Manipal Placement overview
paragraphs: Welcomgroup Graduate School of Hotel Administration (WGSHA) has been ranked Number 1 in 'Supreme Hotel Management Institute in India' since 2007 by GHRDC Hotel Management Institutes Survey 2018. The institute offers 100 per cent placements to students every year.

As per the reviews of WGHSA students, the placements at the institute have improved over a period of time. The institute invites top chain of hotels to participate in the on-campus placements drive every year. Some highlights from the recently-conducted (2019) placements drive are mentioned below:

WGSA conducts a pre-placement workshop every year which lasts for three-four days. This workshop is conducted in the third week of August and the final placements begin after this. In 2019, this workshop was conducted from August 19 to August 22.

WGSHA students are offered domestic and international internships with the brands during their course duration at the institute. Students get hands-on experience of the various live projects during internships. The internship facility is availed by all students studying at the institute.
WGSHA students get to work with the top brands of the hospitality industry. These include luxurious hotels in India as well as abroad. The jobs are also extended from the airline industry
Some of the top companies that offer jobs to WGSHA students include:

The infographic below depicts the top hotels where alumni of WGSHA are currently working. Some of the prominent recruiters include famous hotel chains like Lemon Tree and Marriott along with a French multinational hospitality company that owns many franchises of Accor Hotels.

WGSHA hotel management students had 31 per cent of its alumni placed in the Operations sector followed by Business Development at 17 per cent. Sales and Education are the two other major domains with a very close share of 12 per cent and 10 per cent respectively. Below is a detailed representation of domain wise split for WGSHA ’s alumni.

Welcomgroup Graduate School of Hotel Administration (WGSHA) has been ranked Number 1 in 'Supreme Hotel Management Institute in India' since 2007 by GHRDC Hotel Management Institutes Survey 2018. The institute offers 100 per cent placements to students every year.
WGSHA Placements Highlights 2020
As per the reviews of WGHSA students, the placements at the institute have improved over a period of time. The institute invites top chain of hotels to participate in the on-campus placements drive every year. Some highlights from the recently-conducted (2019) placements drive are mentioned below:

WGHSA Pre-Placement Workshop 2020
WGSA conducts a pre-placement workshop every year which lasts for three-four days. This workshop is conducted in the third week of August and the final placements begin after this. In 2019, this workshop was conducted from August 19 to August 22.
WGSHA Internships 2020
WGSHA students are offered domestic and international internships with the brands during their course duration at the institute. Students get hands-on experience of the various live projects during internships. The internship facility is availed by all students studying at the institute.
WGSHA Top Companies 2020
WGSHA students get to work with the top brands of the hospitality industry. These include luxurious hotels in India as well as abroad. The jobs are also extended from the airline industry

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college ever.
reviews.review_text: Study environment in the college was excellent. We had all the facilities, including well-equipped classrooms, a kitchen, labs, a library, college offices, and an auditorium, etc. The college campus was kept clean and hygienic. The toilets were of star hotel standards, but ours were also very dirty.

reviews.review_heading: Spend 4 years at WGSHA and you can win or close up to you.
reviews.review_text: Top-notch facilities are provided with various opportunities to learn and experiment. Students are provided with a growing number of various software and skills to ensure maximum skills for all students. The quality of hostels and mess is much better than other MAHE hostels when it comes to mess and rooms as it is fully managed by the college which is run by hospitality professionals. All students also receive hospital insurance which helps when students need medical assistance.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good. You'll learn and be a step ahead.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good facilities, including labs and libraries where students can conduct research and experiment with recipes. The college provides all kinds of support to help budding entrepreneurs. The mess hall serves some of the best food at MAHE. The college also provides support for students to participate in sports. With the help of the student council and college faculty, students can develop their talents.

reviews.review_heading: Welcome group Graduate School of Hotel Administration.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best you can get in India. The whole campus is centrally air-conditioned. The hostels have both A/C and non-A/C rooms managed by Zolo, and they are well-maintained. Rooms are cleaned every other day. The mess provides good quality food, and we also have the option to cook in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

Additionally, the mess food is great compared to other mess foods. Another advantage is that the kitchen facilities and uniforms are great.

Big hostels are available in our college. There is a food court inside our college. Medical facilities are available. We arrange sports and games every year.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a very good university and I am happy with it.

Medical facilities are available in our university.

reviews.review_heading: The best infrastructure and teachers are available in this college.

Wi-Fi speed is high. All types of books are available in our library. Quality hostel facilities and a food court are available in our college. Every year, sports and games are arranged in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in our city because all types of facilities are available.
