The classrooms are impeccably clean, and the LAN connectivity is seamless. The Wi-Fi speed is exceptionally fast, ensuring uninterrupted access to the internet. The library houses the best reference books, providing valuable resources for students. Additionally, our college provides top-notch hostel facilities and a food court within its premises. Moreover, we o...

reviews.review_heading: Good atmosphere and best facilities are available in our college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is excellent, with all necessary facilities available. We have spacious classrooms equipped with LANss and projectors. The Wi-Fi speed is very high. Our college library offers a wide range of reference books. Quality facilities are provided in our hostel, and there is a food court available inside the college premises. Medical facilities are also available, and our college organizes sports events every year.

reviews.review_heading: Our department has experienced senior faculty who are incredibly helpful and knowledgeable. Teachers
reviews.review_text: Our college's infrastructure is top-notch, with a conducive atmosphere and very helpful staff. Classrooms are impeccably clean and equipped with LANss and connected projectors. The Wi-Fi speed is exceptionally high, and the library offers the best reference books. We have spacious hostels with in-house food facilities. Medical facilities are available, and our college organizes sports and games every year.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement record in our college, and the college was very good.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities and infrastructure are available in our college for this course. State-of-the-art kitchen labs are well-equipped, classrooms, and library are well-decorated. The highest-speed Wi-Fi Connectivity. The hostel facilities are well-maintained, providing comfortable stay and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I really love this college.
reviews.review_text: All facilities and infrastructures are satisfying in our university. Here, Wi-Fi connection is available. Labs and classrooms are clean. Many books are available in our library. Others like hostel, mess are available. Many foods are available in the canteen. The taste is also good. Sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: If college criteria are matched with your needs, then definitely take admission.

Other facilities like a hostel, mess, playground, and medical center are available. Quality foods as well as a variety of foods are available in our canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Taking admission depends on you.

Others, like hostels, mess, and medical playgrounds, are available. Many quality and variety of foods are available in our canteen.

A privatized higher education, the Welcomgroup Graduate School of Hotel Administration (WGSHA) gives undergraduate, graduate, and doctorate courses in a variety of subjects, including dietetics, applied nutrition, hotel management, and culinary arts.  The average fee structure for courses offered by Welcome Group Graduate School of Hotel Administration is between 10,00,000-15,00,000 for the course as a whole which is to be paid in 3-4 installments and it includes around 10,000 as the refundable amount which is caution deposit.

Welcome to the Graduate School of Hotel Administration at Welcomegroup. We are pleased to offer a range of scholarships for our students, depending on their eligibility for different courses. Some of these scholarships are listed below:

- Scholars and Achievers Scholarship: Available for all UG and PG courses except BTech, BPharma, BSc Nursing, ME, UG/PG Medical/Dental, and Super Specialty. Scholars Category for GEN and Achiever Category for GEN students can receive a 5% scholarship if they meet the following eligibility criteria:

- ITC Scholarship: ITC Hotels Ltd has established a scholarship worth INR 3.5 Lacs for Bachelor of Hotel Management (BHM) students who excel in operational subjects and for the best all-around graduating students at WGSHA.

The following table presents the total BPharm fee at KK University for four years:Fee ComponentFee AmountTuition FeeINR 4.4 LakhExam FeeINR 16,000Admission Fee (one-time)INR 6,000NOTE: The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the course fees for four-year BPharm in KK University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, anyone can enroll directly at KK University by just following the usual admissions process. In class 12, student who meet the minimal eligibility marks can apply directly to the university. Candidates can apply immediately through the online portal by visiting the university's official website, where the application forms are available.Based on the 12th standard grades, KK University does provide direct admission for the majority of undergraduate programs, including BA, BSc, BCom, etc. There is no entrance exam necessary.You need a valid JEE Main score to apply for a BTech. BTech programs do not offer direct admission based on 12th grade grades.On the basis of merit, postgraduate programs such as MA, MSc, and MCom provide direct admission to students of relevant undergraduate degrees.
faqs.question: Can I join KK University directly?

faqs.answer: A:    BSc admission at KK University is subject to the fulfilment of the eligibility criteria specified by the university. Further, candidates are required to present all the necessary documents establishing their eligibility at the time of admission. The KK University BSc eligibility criteria are given below:To be eligible for admission to a BSc (Hons) in Agriculture, candidates must have passed Class 12 with PCM/ PCB/ Agriculture with 40%To be eligible for all other BSc and BSc (Hons) specialisations, candidates must have passed Class 12 in the Science stream with at least 45% in the respective subject
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BSc at KK University?

faqs.answer: A:    BPharm admission at KK University is subject to the fulfilment of the eligibility criteria specified by the university. Further, candidates are required to present all the necessary documents establishing their eligibility at the time of admission. The KK University BPharma eligibility criteria are given below:Candidates must have passed Class 12 with the PCM or PCB, and English as one of the subjectsThey must have attained the minimum age of 17 years on or before December 31 of the year of admission

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of KK University.

review_content.Placements: A total of 98% of students were placed in my course. The top recruiting companies are Tata, Mahindra, Lexus, Ford, etc. The top roles offered in my course are HR and Assistant Manager. The highest package is 6 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. A total of 95% of students got internships in my course at Tata Motors.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course/department include full-speed Wi-Fi for official use only. Labs are big and well-cleaned, and classrooms are big and properly ventilated. The library is well-stocked with books. The quality of facilities available in my hostel is acceptable, and the quality of food in the mess and canteen is good. Medical and sports facilities are also available on campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of KK University.

review_content.Placements: Our placement cell is active throughout the year. They have a neatly designed website through which we can look for opportunities and apply to them. We are eligible for placements in our final year and are encouraged to start applying for opportunities right from the start of our final year. The roles and packages are good, but there is still scope for better placements compared to the North Campus colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel fees are Rs. 5,000 per month and Rs.50,000 per year for neat rooms. There is an increase in cot facilities, and good network facilities are needed for the bathrooms. The hostel food menu is good, but the food quality is bad. The fees are affordable. They provide personal beds and study areas for students from other cities. There is a canteen for food, and students are charged monthly for the hostel. They receive their meals promptly.

faqs.answer: KK University offers a three-year BBA at the UG level. The KK University BBA fee structure includes admission fee, exam fee, tuition fee, etc. The total tuition fee payable over three years is INR 60,000. The total exam fee is INR 12,000. overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for BSc at KK University?
overview_faqs.answer: The KK University BSc fee structure includes tuition fees, exam fees, and admission fees. Additional hostel and mess charges are payable by candidates seeking accommodation at the university. The fee varies across the BSc specialisations offered at the university. The following table presents the total KK University BSc tuition fee for various specialisations:Fee ComponentTuition FeeBSc (Hons) in AgricultureINR 2.4 LakhBSc (Hons) (Chemistry/ Zoology/ Botany/ Physics/ Mathematics)INR 16,000BSc (Chemistry/ Zoology/ Botany/ Physics/ Mathematics)INR 12,000NOTE: The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for BBA at KK University?
overview_faqs.answer: KK University offers a three-year BBA at the UG level. The KK University BBA fee structure includes admission fee, exam fee, tuition fee, etc. The total tuition fee payable over three years is INR 60,000. The total exam fee is INR 12,000. Further, a one-time admission fee of INR 6000 must be paid by the applicants. Additonal hostel fee must be paid by candidates seeking accommodation at the university. It must be noted that the mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: Is KK University good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Absolutely, KK University is good for MBA. It offers an MBA program that was approved by AICTE and recognized by UGC when it was founded in 2004. The fact that it has an NAAC "A" accreditation attests to the high caliber of instruction provided. It provides MBA programs with a range of specializations, including international business, marketing, finance, and human resources. The development of critical management abilities, including communication, leadership, and decision-making, is highly valued at the university. Good placements are the result of its solid industry partnerships; some of the main employers are ICICI, HDFC, Axis Bank, Flipkart, Paytm, and others.Course fees are reasonable when compared to more expensive B-schools. Scholarships come with a lot of options.Because it's in Bihar, students from eastern India can easily access it.

overview_faqs.question: What is the course fees for four-year BPharm in KK University?
overview_faqs.answer: KK University offers a four-year BPharm in the full-time mode. The KK University BPharm fee structure includes tuition fees, exam fees, and admission fees. Additional hostel and mess charges are payable by candidates seeking accommodation at the university. The following table presents the total BPharm fee at KK University for four years:Fee ComponentFee AmountTuition FeeINR 4.4 LakhExam FeeINR 16,000Admission Fee (one-time)INR 6,000NOTE: The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: KK University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of KK University.

content.Placements: About 70% of the students get placements from our course. In our college, the highest salary package offered is 4.5 LPA, while the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Companies visit our college to select freshers to build their future. Big and small companies like Paytm, Tata, Wipro, etc., visit our college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities of our college include Wi-Fi facility with 35 MB high-speed. Labs are well developed, like they have the mechanical and civil engineering branch required machines, a computer lab with high technology, and an electronics lab. Classrooms are well-designed and divided into sections to provide a great learning experience.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of KK University.

content.Placements: Last year, the placement was not good. The highest package offered was 4 LPA, and the lowest package was 2.2 LPA. There is no placement cell. 5 to 6 percent of the students have been placed, and the average salary was 3.25 LPA. All the students have done their internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is too good, no doubt about it. The facilities provided are drinking water, a playing ground, a basketball court, a stage for program functions, a bank, and an ATM, all of which are available on our college campus. The bus facilities are also available. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. There is no Wi-Fi connection provided for the students, not even for the hostel students.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of KK University.

content.Placements: A total of 98% of students were placed in my course. The top recruiting companies are Tata, Mahindra, Lexus, Ford, etc. The top roles offered in my course are HR and Assistant Manager. The highest package is 6 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. A total of 95% of students got internships in my course at Tata Motors.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course/department include full-speed Wi-Fi for official use only. Labs are big and well-cleaned, and classrooms are big and properly ventilated. The library is well-stocked with books. The quality of facilities available in my hostel is acceptable, and the quality of food in the mess and canteen is good. Medical and sports facilities are also available on campus.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of KK University.

content.Placements: Our placement cell is active throughout the year. They have a neatly designed website through which we can look for opportunities and apply to them. We are eligible for placements in our final year and are encouraged to start applying for opportunities right from the start of our final year. The roles and packages are good, but there is still scope for better placements compared to the North Campus colleges.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel fees are Rs. 5,000 per month and Rs.50,000 per year for neat rooms. There is an increase in cot facilities, and good network facilities are needed for the bathrooms. The hostel food menu is good, but the food quality is bad. The fees are affordable. They provide personal beds and study areas for students from other cities. There is a canteen for food, and students are charged monthly for the hostel. They receive their meals promptly.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of KK University.

content.Placements: The most attractive thing about the university is its high-paying packages in companies like Infosys, Wipro, and other highly reputable companies. The placements in our colleges are not like a piece of cake belonging to some particular students. It is accessible to all the students equally.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and the environment on the campus are highly satisfying and are good for a student to concentrate well. The rooms are very well ventilated, and they have an accurate temperature in both summer and winter. The students at the university take pride in telling others about their campus.

admission_overview.college_name: KK University Admission 2025: Courses and Fees, Eligibility, Selection and Application Forms

admission_process.title: KK University Admission Process 2024

paragraphs: KK University admissionto all professional and technical courses is based on the performance of the candidate in theKK University entrance exam. However, for some courses, the admission criteria are merit-based. Candidates willing to take admission toKK University coursesare required to meet the eligibility criteria of their desired course and then fill out the application form before the deadline.

KK Universityoffers more than twenty-five courses through its ten constituent schools. The courses are offered at undergraduate, postgraduate and diploma levels in multiple streams such as commerce and management, engineering and technology, arts, etc.

KK University course eligibility criteriarequire candidates to have at least twelve years of school education for admission. However, the eligibility is also based on the level of the course. Studnets can check some of the eligibility and selection criteria forKK University courses:
Class 12 in PCM with a minimum of 45% marks (40% for reserved categories)

To secure their seats in KK University, candidates are required to pay the fees mentioned below. The fees includes various components such as caution money, alumni fees, university enrollment fees, etc. TheKKU fees and seatsfor the academic year 2024:
Students can check the KK University dmission procedure mentioned below:
1- KK University Application Process
Contenders seeking admission to the KK University courses must fill out the Application Form. Submit the form to the Officer in Charge (Admission) of the University before the deadline.
The application will be examined by the Admission Counsellor, followed by approval from the respective Faculty Dean/Principal.
2- KK University Selection Criteria
KK University admission criteria is based on merit and may include an Admission/ Entrance Test and a personal interview, as well as verification of all original documents.
Certain programmes may have specific eligibility criteria based on qualifying examination/test pass percentages.
3- Admission Confirmation
Students must provide a Transfer Certificate/Migration Certificate for admission to any programme.

faqs.question: Does KK University accept MAT score?
faqs.answer: Absolutely, KK University accepts scores from the Management Aptitude Test (MAT) for admission to its PGDM and MBA programs. Based on their MAT results, KK University shortlists applicants for admission to its two-year full-time MBA program. faqs.answer: Yes, KK University follows the seat reservation guidelines of the state government of Bihar. The university reserves seats for various categories as per the Bihar Reservation Act, 2003. faqs.question: Can I join KK University directly?
faqs.answer: Yes, anyone can enroll directly at KK University by just following the usual admissions process. In class 12, student who meet the minimal eligibility marks can apply directly to the university. Candidates can apply immediately through the online portal by visiting the university's official website, where the application forms are available.Based on the 12th standard grades, KK University does provide direct admission for the majority of undergraduate programs, including BA, BSc, BCom, etc. There is no entrance exam necessary.You need a valid JEE Main score to apply for a BTech. BTech programs do not offer direct admission based on 12th grade grades.On the basis of merit, postgraduate programs such as MA, MSc, and MCom provide direct admission to students of relevant undergraduate degrees.

faqs.question: What are the KK University BSc admission dates?
faqs.answer: KK University BSc admission dates vary from year to year. These dates inlcude the dates relating to the application and the selection process conducted for BSc admissions at the university. Every year, the university releases the admission schedule on its official website or through a notification in regional newspapers. As per the university's eligibility criteria, candidates must have completed Class 12 before applying for admission. Hence, candidates must apply once their Class 12 results are declared. For the latest information on admission dates, aspirants must visit the university's official website frequently or contact the university's admission team.

faqs.question: How many BPharm seats are available at KK University?
faqs.answer: KK University has a total intake of 60 students for its BPharm programme. The university shortlists prospective candidates for admission against BPharm seats through the university entrance test, followed by a Group Discussion (GD) and/ or a Personal Interview (PI). It must be noted that the mentioned information on seats is sourced from the official website of the university/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

reviews.review_text: Hostel fees are Rs. 5,000 per month and Rs.50,000 per year for neat rooms. There is an increase in cot facilities, and good network facilities are needed for the bathrooms. The hostel food menu is good, but the food quality is bad. The fees are affordable. They provide personal beds and study areas for students from other cities. There is a canteen for food, and students are charged monthly for the hostel. They receive their meals promptly.

reviews.review_heading: Review of KK University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and the environment on the campus are highly satisfying and are good for a student to concentrate well. The rooms are very well ventilated, and they have an accurate temperature in both summer and winter. The students at the university take pride in telling others about their campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied and relevant because of faculty in our college and good placement in 2021.
reviews.review_text: In my college, there are awesome facilities available, such as Wi-Fi in every corner, labs available for practicals, and workshops available for mechanical students. In the hostel, there are separate lockers for every student, and the food in the mess is awesome. Many sports are available for both boys and girls, such as cricket, badminton, etc.

reviews.review_heading: You can admission in our college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very good but no Wi-Fi available in college. Smart class is average the hostel is decorated good the mess faculty is also good. There is no library for students and there are many lacks of books. Cafeteria is also available in our college and food quality is very good.

reviews.review_heading: B.Sc. agriculture in my college.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is well good. There is no Wi-Fi in our campus and smart classrooms are available and the hostel is well decorated and the mess faculty is pretty good. There is no library in our college for students. 
1 cafeteria is available in college.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. There is no library for students and books are not available on time. There is no Wi-Fi in our college. Smart classrooms are good. The hostel is well-decorated. The mess facility is good. Canteen is available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, but compared to the rest of the campus, management is not good.
reviews.review_text: Our college building, classrooms, laboratories, and other facilities were good, but when it comes to education, these facilities were not good. There was no proper management for fee structure, submitting fees, getting a degree, and mark sheets. They will make students run from here and there for no reason.

reviews.review_heading: This college is a private and newly established.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good, but provided facilities in this college are not good. No Wi-Fi, laboratories are average, classrooms are also average, and the library is also average. In hostels, faculty members and students are live together so students can ask their doubts at any time. Food available in mess is average and sports and, games are good in this college.

reviews.review_heading: I am completely disappointed with this bad college.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility. Labs are available only for checking purposes. Classrooms are mixed like mechanical and civil students are studying together with the same teacher in the same room. It serves very dirty food. There is no library, and it is only for representation. There are only staff members for medical purposes. Our college does not provide sports, and there are only fields full of grass.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest you not to take admission to this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very good. On this campus, you feel like you are in a very big college. Classrooms are also good, and there are all departments and all labs. The quality of the hostel provided is quite good, but the food served is not much good. A medical room is available, but there is no doctor. There is a big playground and a basketball court also.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, KK University is good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided in the hostel are good. It has a good water supply. The food is good. Campus facilities are average. The infrastructure is excellent. Buildings are very beautiful, and a garden is present. Lift facilities are not available. A waterfall is present.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college, and it has good placements.
reviews.review_text: All the rooms are cleaned. Many teachers also stay in the hostel, so students get an opportunity to get to know about teachers and learn many things. Everything is much better in the hostel, and the food quality is very high. New gym facilities are provided to keep the students fit and fine.

paragraphs: The KK University BSc fee structure includes tuition fees, exam fees, and admission fees. Additional hostel and mess charges are payable by candidates seeking accommodation at the university. The fee varies across the BSc specialisations offered at the university. The following table presents the total KK University BSc tuition fee for various specialisations:
NOTE: The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

KK University offers a three-year BBA at the UG level. The KK University BBA fee structure includes admission fee, exam fee, tuition fee, etc. The total tuition fee payable over three years is INR 60,000. The total exam fee is INR 12,000. Further, a one-time admission fee of INR 6000 must be paid by the applicants. Additonal hostel fee must be paid by candidates seeking accommodation at the university. It must be noted that the mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

KK University offers a four-year BPharm in the full-time mode. The KK University BPharm fee structure includes tuition fees, exam fees, and admission fees. Additional hostel and mess charges are payable by candidates seeking accommodation at the university. The following table presents the total BPharm fee at KK University for four years:
NOTE: The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

At the UG level, KK University offers a three-year BCom course. The total tution fee for the programme is INR 12,000. The university also offers a BCom (Hons). The tuition fee for the four-year programme is INR 16,000. Besides the tuition fee, the KK University BCom fee structure includes admission fee, exam fee, hostel fee, etc. It must be noted that the mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.answer: Adikavi Nannaya University cutoff 2024 for Round 1 has been released for BTech courses in the form of opening and closing ranks. The Adikavi Nannaya University Andhra Pradesh EAMCET cutoff 2024 ranged between 25678 and 116677. The most competitive course for General Home State category candidates was the BTech in Computer Science and Engineering specialisation, with a cutoff rank of 25678 offered through Andhra Pradesh EAMCET scores, followed by counselling. The UG-level programme is divided into eight semesters. Further, there is lateral-entry admission to the third semester of the BPharma programme, which lasts for three years. BPharma admission is based on Andhra Pradesh EAPCET. However, applicants should first qualify the eligibility criteria of BPharma, i.e., Class 12 or equivalent examination pass from a recognised board with the required minimum aggregate. Candidate should have passed the qualifying exam with English as one of the subjects and Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, and Biology as optional subjects.

content.Placements: We get a very high percentage of selections for placements and got great careers in MNC companies. Our friend got the highest package of the year, like 24 LPA in AI 27/7 company. admission_overview.college_name: Adikavi Nannaya University Admission 2025 (Open): Application, Dates

admission_process.title: Adikavi Nannaya University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: The admission 2025is conducted via an entrance-based process. The institute offers a variety of courses such as BTech, BA, LLB, etc. The institute offers UG and PG courses for candidates. Candidates must fill out the application form on the official website ofAdikavi Nannaya Universityto register themselves for their desired course. Candidates are required to appear for the AP CETs in order to participate in the admission process.

At the undergraduate and postgraduate level, the University provides a range of engineering, Management, Law, and courses from various other fields. To have a chance of getting a spot in the course they want, candidates must take part in the entrance-based admissions procedure. The courses are available offline and full-time. Use the table below to find out more about the university's highlights:
Particulars
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
50+ courses including various specialisations
How to apply?
https://aknu.edu.in/DOA/courses.php
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from the official website.

The University offers a variety of undergraduate and postgraduate courses for candidates who are interested in taking admission in the university. Candidates must meet the eligibility standards and follow the screening procedure in order to be considered for the final admission offer. The table below shows the eligibility and selection requirements forAdikavi Nannaya University courses:

The University offers courses at the UG and PG course levels. Candidates who clear the entrance-based admission process are given the offer to pay the fee and secure their seat in the course. The number of candidates who are shortlisted depends on the seat intake for the particular course. Check out the table below to learn more aboutAdikavi Nannaya University feeand seat intake:
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from the official website.

The initial stage in the admissions procedure is registration. Both the needed entrance exam and the desired course must be applied for by candidates. Candidates are shortlisted for admission based on how well they performed on the entrance exams. The sequential admissions process is described below:

The application process for admissions are ongoing on the official website of the institute. Candidates are required to fill out their details and submit the form to successfully register for the programme. For any queries related to the application form, candidates can reach out to the number mentioned on: https://aknu.edu.in/DOA/courses.php

Candidates are shortlisted based on their performance in the entrance exams conducted by the university. Candidates are required to appear for the CET which is required for their desired course. Candidates who are shortlisted go further in the admission rounds.

Candidates who clear the cutoff in the CETs get the final admission offer from the university. Candidates are required to confirm their seat by paying the required fee for their course. Candidates are also required to appear for the document verification round in order to prove the details they have provided in the application and other forms.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for the Adikavi Nannaya University?
faqs.answer: The admission process for courses at Adikavi Nannaya University is entrance based for all the courses. For admissions to different programmes candidates are required to appear for different entrance exams such as the Andhra Pradesh CETs. The performance of candidates in the entrance decides whether they will get the final admission offer or not.

faqs.question: Can I join Adikavi Nannaya University without JEE Mains?
faqs.answer: Admissions to Adikavi Nannaya University are based upon candidates performance in different Ap CETs. Candidates must go through the selection criteria for their desired course to find out the entrance they need to apply for to get admission. Adikavi Nannaya University does not accept JEE Mains for admission intake into any course. Candidates must only appear for the university conducted entrance and secure their seat.

faqs.question: Can I join Adikavi Nannaya University directly?
faqs.answer: You cannot enrol directly in Adikavi Nannaya University. Prior to anything else, you must pass your 10+2 or equivalent test with at least 50% of the possible points. Adikavi Nannaya University's entrance exam must also be passed in order to be admitted to the appropriate programme. The Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education administers the entrance test for B.Tech programmes at Adikavi Nannaya University (APSCHE).The university itself administers the admission exam for its M.Tech programmes at Adikavi Nannaya University. The exam is held in June each year. The university of Adikavi Nannaya administers the entrance exam for additional undergraduate and graduate programmes. The university website announces the dates and specifics of the exams.

faqs.question: How can I get BPharma admission in Adikavi Nannaya University?
faqs.answer: Candidates must complete the Adikavi Nannaya University admission process to get admission to the BPharma course. The admission process includes the application process, selection process, counselling, and final admission. Before proceeding with the admission process, make sure to qualify for the eligibility criteria of the BPharma course. Eligible candidates must visit the official website of Andhra Pradesh EAMCET and fill out the exam application form. Once the exam is concluded, candidates are shortlisted based on the scores obtained in the exam. Further, shortlisted candidates must go through the Andhra Pradesh EAMCET counselling process for seat allocation in the participating universities (Adikavi Nannaya University). After the seats are allocated, candidates must pay the Adikavi Nannaya University BPharma course fee to finalize the admission.

paragraphs: The university has not released the placement report for the year 2023. However, NIRF report 2023 is available on the official website. As per NIRF report 2023, a total of 53 MBA and students were placed and 52 Engineering students were placed during placements 2022. The median package offered to BTech , MTech and MBA students was INR 4.80 LPA, INR 2.80 LPA and INR 60,000 , respectively during Adikavi Nannaya University placements 2022.

faqs.question: What is the highest package of Adikavi Nannaya University?
faqs.answer: The university has not released the highest package offered for the year 2023. However, as per Shiksha review, the highest package and other placement details that took place for BTech in Electronics and Instrument Engineering during the recent placement drive are mentioned in the table below: Particulars Statistics the highest package INR 3.60 LPA the lowest package INR 1.80 LPA Placement rate Above 75% Note: The placement stats mentioned are gathered from Shiksha review. Hence, the stats may vary further.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Adikavi Nannaya University?
faqs.answer: The placements at the Adikavi Nannaya University for the MBA Programme are okay. The median salary package that was offered to the students of this institution was Rs. 60,000 per annum. The median salary package offered to students in 2021 was 68,000. But it decreased from 68,000 to 60,000 in 2022, when compared to the previous year. A total of 53 MBA students were placed during the placements of 2023 as per the NIRF report. This University also has a rating of 4.1 for the placements.

faqs.question: Does Adikavi Nannaya University offer better placements than Sri Vani Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Adikavi Nannaya University (ANU) and Sri Van Group of Institutions (SVIG) both offer internships to B.Tech graduates. However, ANU has a stronger investment history and has established ties with leading companies across India. According to the ANU placement report for the academic year 2022-2023, the average salary package for B.Tech graduates was Rs 7.5 Lacs per annum. The biggest salary package offered was 25 Lacs per year. Top recruiters for ANU B.Tech are Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Amazon and Microsoft. According to the SVIG placement report for the academic year 2022-23, the average salary package for B.Tech graduates was 6 Lacs per annum. The biggest salary package offered was 15 Lacs per year. Top recruiters of SVIG B.Tech graduates are TCS, Infosys, Wipro and Amazon.

review_content.Placements: The college is in a rural area of Akola. About 10 km from the city. But patient flow is good, with a minimum of 100 patients visiting and a maximum of 150–160. And, college allows students to treat patients from 3rd and final year postings under staff observation. Interns can treat patients.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good, and it costs around INR 40,000 per year, and mess is not included. 2 meals are available on the college campus and provide decent food. Mess costs INR 3000 per month. Mess charges are to be paid to the owner directly. For sports, there is a basketball court, a football court, and a cricket ground. Medical facilities are available in college.

college_info.intro:
Poornima University Jaipur is known for its range of programmes across several streams such as Engineering, Management, Design, Arts, Commerce, etc. Among these courses the university is known for a few popular programmes which are listed below:
The university offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. Poornima University Jaipur aims to produce a quality learning environment for students that helps them enhance various problem-solving skills. Overall, the university is one of the reputed universities that offer education in and various other fields.
Poornima University BTech graduates can take on a number of roles including Software Engineers, Data Scientists, and others, while MBA graduates are offered roles as Product Managers, Financial Analysts, etc. Interested students can also check out the other popular courses at Poornima University below:

Students can work with faculty on research projects

Many students started their own start-ups

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Many students started their own start-ups
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Poornima University conducts placement drives annually for courses like BTech, BCA, MCA, MBA, etc. The students secured the average package of INR 4.01 LPA in the academic year 2024-25. The highest package offered during Poornima University placements 2025 stood at INR 13.13 LPA. The median salary was INR 3.6 LPA.
faqs.question: Does Poornima University conduct on-campus placements?

faqs.answer: A:    The Poornima University highest package offered during the 2025 placement drive stood at INR 13.13 LPA. faqs.question: What is the average package offered at Poornima University?

faqs.answer: A:    Poornima University provides a two-year MBA programme to its students. The first year's tuition is INR 1.15 lakh. Poornima University charges an annual cost of INR 2.30 Lacs to INR 4 Lacs for an MBA. You must have a 50% graduation rate to be eligible for the MBA program. This MBA programme offers specializations in digital marketing and finance, digital marketing and human resources, and sustainability and entrepreneurship.
faqs.question: What are the fees for MBA programmes at Poornima University?

faqs.answer: A:     A pass in three-year UG degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ non-creamy layer OBC/ SBC/ Girls) is required to apply for MBA courses. Candidates must pass UG degree or equivalent with at least 55% aggregate to apply for Poornima University MBA Sustainability & Entrepreneurship.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Poornima University?

faqs.answer: A:    Poornima University in Jaipur, Rajasthan, has 94 programmes available, including an MBA. There are roughly 2190 seats available in total.The 70% of the university's seats are filled through an entrance exam.  A minimum of 50% is required for admission to the MBA Finance Management program. This college provides the 2 years of  MBA course for the students.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for the MBA programme at Poornima University?

faqs.answer: A:    Poornima University accept NCHMCT JEE cutoff for admission to the BSc HHA course. The students who meet the cutoff criteria are allotted a seat. In 2023, the closing rank for the Hospitality course was 9233, which got better from the last two years, with 9495 in 2022 and 10671 in 2021.
faqs.question: What is the cutoff of Poornima University for BSc HHA?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure facilities not satisfied with placements.

review_content.Placements: In my course 20 percent of students placed this year 2025. The highest package offered is 7LPA, the lowest package is 3.5LPA and the average package is 4LPA. Top recruiters are Fingertips, cellular technologies, and Robo MQ. 30 percent get internships. The Data Engineer roles course is very excellent but not for average students studywise.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university provides Wi-Fi in each and every PC. Labs are excellent with AC and projectors. Classrooms are also very nice. Infrastructure is excellent. Food in hostel is average or above average we can say. Canteen is also there, sports facility is also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: MCA in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Poornima University: Best college for placements and learning.

review_content.Placements: College provides lots of placement opportunities. In the year, lots of companies visit for campus drives. There is approximately a 50-60% placement percentage. The lowest packages depend on the company, they vary from 2.5 to 3.5 LPA, and the highest packages go up to 12-15 LPA. Many good companies come for placement, like Infosys, Josh, Datansh, Metacube, TCS, Dotsquare, and CIMET.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus covers 32 acres and features cutting-edge ICT-enabled classrooms with Wi-Fi, LAN, and projectors. Seminar halls, auditoriums, and multimedia-equipped lecture rooms support conferences, workshops, and cultural events. The central library offers over 2400 volumes, a wide range of journals, and access to IEEE, DELNET, and other digital resources for engineering, management, architecture, and IT programs. Hostels are located on campus with secure access, providing accommodation for both boys and girls, including Himalaya Boys and Gargi Girls hostels. Hostel messes serve four daily meals under hygienic standards, alongside canteens offering vegetarian snacks.

course_faqs.answer: Yes, it is worth pursuing MBA at Poornima University as is approved by UGC, AIU, and COA. The university has ranked 104 in the BBA category, 33 in the Architecture category, and 121 in the BCom category by India Today 2024. overview_faqs.question: Is Poornima University worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Poornima University is worth considering as it is approved by UGC, AIU, and COA. The university has 104 in the BBA category, 33 in the Architecture category, and 121 in the BCom category by India Today 2024. In addition to this, the university has also been ranked by various recognised ranking bodies such as The Week, The Times of India, and Outlook. Apart from this, Poornima University also offers placement assistance to students in leading companies such as Amazon, Microsoft, Dell, Google, and many more.

overview_faqs.question: How is the life like at Poornima University?
overview_faqs.answer: As per the Shiksha verified review, Poornima University is rated 4.1/5 for Crowd & Campus Life. The campus life is amazing as there is canteen and various facilities provided to students which makes the life of students quite easy. Hostel facilities are provided to students. The university also arranges various events, seminars, and conferences for students.

review_summary.college_name: Poornima University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. CSE (Full stack Development and Mobile Applications) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Modern campus, good learning.

content.Placements: At Poornima University, placement opportunities vary by branch and individual performance. Generally, around 80 to 90 percent of students in popular branches like Computer Science and it get placed. The real placement numbers are very high for this college.
content.Infrastructure: My university offers modern infrastructure with well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, libraries, and sports facilities. It provides multiple courses like B.Tech, MBA, BVA, BBA, and design, along with a comfortable hostel featuring Wi-Fi, mess, sports, and many gardens.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely fantastic college and campus life to enjoy, and a perfect placement ratio.

content.Placements: The total number of students in B.Tech CSE is almost 1500. So a minimum of 100 to 120 students is selected. The highest package is 23 Lacs, the average package is 6-7 Lacs, and the lowest package is 2-3 Lacs. The above details are based on campus placement records. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and HCL Technologies. In our college, internships start from the 6th semester, and mainly they are with local companies based in Jaipur. Almost 20 to 30% of students get internships, mainly for data analyst positions.
content.Infrastructure: In the first year, you explore various types of labs like electrical, electronics, CADD, Python, C lab, workshop, Physics lab, Chemistry lab, etc. From the second year, all your classes are held in lab rooms, and you get a personal desktop for all your classes. Hostel accommodation is very good; there are four hostels on our campus and also four hostels outside the campus. The mess is in a very large area on our campus, and there are two big mess halls with a capacity of a minimum of 800 students eating at a time. In a day, meals are served four times. Hostel life is very good on campus with free Wi-Fi, laundry, sports coaches, a gym, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure facilities not satisfied with placements.

content.Placements: In my course 20 percent of students placed this year 2025. The highest package offered is 7LPA, the lowest package is 3.5LPA and the average package is 4LPA. Top recruiters are Fingertips, cellular technologies, and Robo MQ. 30 percent get internships. The Data Engineer roles course is very excellent but not for average students studywise.
content.Infrastructure: The university provides Wi-Fi in each and every PC. Labs are excellent with AC and projectors. Classrooms are also very nice. Infrastructure is excellent. Food in hostel is average or above average we can say. Canteen is also there, sports facility is also available.

individual_reviews.course: MCA in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Poornima University: Best college for placements and learning.

content.Placements: College provides lots of placement opportunities. In the year, lots of companies visit for campus drives. There is approximately a 50-60% placement percentage. The lowest packages depend on the company, they vary from 2.5 to 3.5 LPA, and the highest packages go up to 12-15 LPA. Many good companies come for placement, like Infosys, Josh, Datansh, Metacube, TCS, Dotsquare, and CIMET.
content.Infrastructure: The campus covers 32 acres and features cutting-edge ICT-enabled classrooms with Wi-Fi, LAN, and projectors. Seminar halls, auditoriums, and multimedia-equipped lecture rooms support conferences, workshops, and cultural events. The central library offers over 2400 volumes, a wide range of journals, and access to IEEE, DELNET, and other digital resources for engineering, management, architecture, and IT programs. Hostels are located on campus with secure access, providing accommodation for both boys and girls, including Himalaya Boys and Gargi Girls hostels. Hostel messes serve four daily meals under hygienic standards, alongside canteens offering vegetarian snacks.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It's all good and the best.

content.Placements: 60 to 80 per cent of students were placed most of the time in our college. The highest package is 30 LPA. The lowest is approximately 5.5. Top recruiting companies are IBM, Microsoft, Amazon, etc. 60 to 90 per cent of students were placed in internships. Top roles offered as a software intern, web developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All good, but need to be better, and one thing which I also notice is that it's improving day by day. The management also saw that they needed to improve, so they implemented the procedure, and they are trying their best, but the quality in the hostel is, although good.

admission_overview.college_name: Poornima University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_process.title: Poornima University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Poornima University admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The university conducts its own entrance exam as well as accepts national-level entrance exams like NATA, UGC NET etc. for providing admission to specific courses.Poornima Universityoffers over 92 courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams like Engineering, Management, Design, Architecture, etc. through nine faculties. Candidates can apply online or offline for Poornima University course admissions.
Poornima University Admission Open:Apply Now

Poornima University admissions are open online. Candidates need to fulfil the eligibility and selection criteria to take admission to any of the UG or PG programmes. Find below the key highlights for Poornima University admissions:
Particulars
Poornima University Admission 2025 Highlights
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
How to apply?
https://www.poornima.edu.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
Poornima University Admission Brochure (2025)

Candidates can get admission to UG courses only if they have completed Class 12. Graduation is the minimum required to get admission to PG courses. The selection criteria will differ course-wise. Check below the popularPoornima University Jaipur coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Class 12 in relevant subjects with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate in case of candidates belonging to SC/ ST/ OBC/ SBC)
Merit-based
3-year UG degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ non-creamy layer OBC/ SBC/ Girls)
UG degree or equivalent with at least 55% aggregate for MBA Sustainability & Entrepreneurship
Written test + Interview (MBA Sustainability & Entrepreneurship), Merit-based (for all other specialisations)
Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ non-creamy layer OBC/ SBC/ Girls)
Merit-based
Class 12 in any stream with at least 70% aggregate for BBA (Hons)
Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ non-creamy layer OBC/ SBC/ Girls)
Merit-based (BBA), Written Test + Interview- for BBA (Hons)

BCA/ BSc Computer Science/ BSc IT/ BE CSE/ BTech CSE/ BE IT/ BTech IT or equivalent degree or any graduation preferably with Mathematics at Class 12 level or at graduation level with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category)
Merit-based
Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ non-creamy layer OBC/ SBC/ Girls)
Class 12 in Science/ Commerce stream with at least 75% aggregate for BCom (Hons)
Merit-based (BCom), Written Test + Interview- for BCom (Hons)

Poornima University admission processincludes multiple steps. Aspirants need to begin with filling the application form. The selection will be either based on merit or an entrance exam. Find below the step-wise admission process for Poornima University:
STEP 1: Poornima University Application Process 2025

Candidates can apply online or offline for any of the UG or PG programmes of Poornima University. Candidates need to pay an application fee ofINR 1,500. Aspirants need to fill out the form and submit it along with the specified documents.
STEP 2: Selection Process

Poornima University selects candidates based on merit for most of the programmes. For BBA (Hons), and BCom (Hons), the university conducts a written test to shortlisted candidates for admission. The national-level entrance exams such asNATA,UGC NETare also accepted for admission to specific courses. Selected candidates might also need to come for a personal interview round for some courses.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
After completion of all the selection rounds, candidates receive an offer letter. Selected aspirants are required to pay the course fee to confirm their admission in the university.

courses_data.description: BTech is a four-year course spread across eight semesters. Poornima University offers BTech in eight specialisations through Faculty of Computer Science Engineering and Faculty of Engineering & Technology. The university also provides lateral entry to the BTech course. Candidates who have passed Class 12 are eligible to apply for any of the BTech specialisations. Candidates need to pass in Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC/ SBC) inMathematics, Physics and anyone subject out ofChemistry/ Computer Science/ Electronics/ Information Technology/Biology/ Informatics Practices/ Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational Subject/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/ Entrepreneurship to apply for BTech course.

courses_data.name: Poornima University BBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: BBA is a three-year programme divided into six semesters. The university offers BBA in four specialisations through the Faculty of Management & Commerce. Faculty of Innovation, Research and Entrepreneurship offers BBA (Hons) in Financial Markets for a duration of three-years. The years graduation programme can be extended to 4 years graduation. Candidates after completing Class 12 can apply for the BBA and BBA (Hons) courses.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for the BBA course at Poornima University?
faqs.answer: Poornima University conducts an entrance exam for providing admission to BBA (Hons) course. The shortlisted candidates are required to come for the interview round for final selection. For BBA admission, candidates will be shortlisted based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Candidates need to pay fee to confirm their seat in the university. T

Aspirants who have passed Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ non-creamy layer OBC/ SBC/ Girls) are eligible to apply for the BBA course. courses_data.name: Poornima University MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Poornima University offers MBA in two specialisations through the Faculty of Management & Commerce. Additionally, the university offers MBA Sustainability and Entrepreneurship through the Faculty of Innovation, Research and Entrepreneurship. Candidates after completing graduation can apply for the MBA courses. A pass in three-year UG degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ non-creamy layer OBC/ SBC/ Girls) is required to apply for MBA courses. Candidates must pass UG degree or equivalent with at least 55% aggregate to apply for MBA Sustainability & Entrepreneurship.

faqs.question: What is the procedure to take MBA admission at Poornima University?
faqs.answer: MBA is a two-year course divided into four semesters. Poornima University offers MBA in two specialisations through the Faculty of Management & Commerce. The university offers admission to MBA based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Poornima University conducts an entrance exam for an MBA Sustainability & Entrepreneurship. Selected candidates are further called for a personal interview round.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Poornima University?
faqs.answer: A pass in three-year UG degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ non-creamy layer OBC/ SBC/ Girls) is required to apply for MBA courses. Candidates must pass UG degree or equivalent with at least 55% aggregate to apply for Poornima University MBA Sustainability & Entrepreneurship.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for the MBA programme at Poornima University?
faqs.answer: Poornima University in Jaipur, Rajasthan, has 94 programmes available, including an MBA. There are roughly 2190 seats available in total.The 70% of the university's seats are filled through an entrance exam.  A minimum of 50% is required for admission to the MBA Finance Management program. This college provides the 2 years of  MBA course for the students.

placement_report.college_name: Poornima University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Poornima University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Poornima University has concluded the placement drive for the Class of 2025. The students secured the average package of INR 4.01 LPA in the academic year 2024-25. The highest package offered during Poornima University placements 2025 stood at INR 13.13 LPA. The median salary was INR 3.6 LPA . Earlier, the highest and average salary offered to the batch 2024 was INR 12 LPA and INR 4.17 LPA. The top recruiters of Poornima University Jaipur in 2024 include Morgan Stanley, Nimai Fintech, Planet Spark, Squad Stack, etc.

faqs.question: What is the scope of job after BSc?
faqs.answer: With BSc degree you are eligible for majority of non technical posts in Government (Central, State, PSU, Banks etc) where eligibility criterion is graduation degree. Beside this you may able to get job of technician, lab assistant in Scientific R&D organisation. You are also eligible to do BEd and take school teacher job. In order to have better career growth you will have to do post graduation.

faqs.question: What are the fees for MBA programmes at Poornima University?
faqs.answer: Poornima University provides a two-year MBA programme to its students. The first year's tuition is INR 1.15 lakh. Poornima University charges an annual cost of INR 2.30 Lacs to INR 4 Lacs for an MBA. You must have a 50% graduation rate to be eligible for the MBA program. This MBA programme offers specializations in digital marketing and finance, digital marketing and human resources, and sustainability and entrepreneurship.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for Poornima University?
faqs.answer: Candidates when applying for any of the UG or PG programme at Poornima University have to pay an application fee. The application fee for all courses is INR 1,500 each. Aspirants can pay the fee via any of the online payment modes. Once paid, aspirants must keep the payment slip for reference in future.

description: Poornima University cutoff 2025 is available on this page, along with past years' cutoff trends for admission to the BSc (Hospitality & Hotel Administration) course. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI quota. Candidates can refer to the sections below to view the Poornima University NCHMCT JEE cutoff 2025 across different rounds and categories. A few more updates are below:

Poornima University NCHMCT JEE cutoff 2024 was announced for admission to the BSc (Hospitality & Hotel Administration) course. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI quota. During the Poornima University BSc cutoff 2024, the last-round closing rank was 1641.

In 2024, the NCHMCT JEE last round cutoff rank was 1641 for admission to the BSc course. For the same course, the last round cutoff rank was concluded at 9233 in 2023 and 9495 in 2022. Upon analysis of the past three years' last round cutoff data, BSc saw a drop in its closing rank for the General AI category students.

outlook.description:
According to the rankings from Outlook-ICARE, Poornima University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. Poornima University's rankings in 'Science' category have shown stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, Poornima University's rank is #63, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
In the 'Architecture (Private)' category, the rankings of the institute have demonstrated a stable trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Poornima University's rank is #26, the same as last year's rank in the 'Architecture (Private)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
The 'BCA' category rankings of the institute have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Poornima University's rank is #69, the same as last year's rank in the 'BCA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'Commerce' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Poornima University's rank is #115, the same as last year's rank in the 'Commerce' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

reviews.review_heading: Modern campus, good learning.
reviews.review_text: My university offers modern infrastructure with well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, libraries, and sports facilities. It provides multiple courses like B.Tech, MBA, BVA, BBA, and design, along with a comfortable hostel featuring Wi-Fi, mess, sports, and many gardens.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely fantastic college and campus life to enjoy, and a perfect placement ratio.
reviews.review_text: In the first year, you explore various types of labs like electrical, electronics, CADD, Python, C lab, workshop, Physics lab, Chemistry lab, etc. From the second year, all your classes are held in lab rooms, and you get a personal desktop for all your classes. Hostel accommodation is very good; there are four hostels on our campus and also four hostels outside the campus. The mess is in a very large area on our campus, and there are two big mess halls with a capacity of a minimum of 800 student...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure facilities not satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: The university provides Wi-Fi in each and every PC. Labs are excellent with AC and projectors. Classrooms are also very nice. Infrastructure is excellent. Food in hostel is average or above average we can say. Canteen is also there, sports facility is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Poornima University: Best college for placements and learning.
reviews.review_text: The campus covers 32 acres and features cutting-edge ICT-enabled classrooms with Wi-Fi, LAN, and projectors. Seminar halls, auditoriums, and multimedia-equipped lecture rooms support conferences, workshops, and cultural events. The central library offers over 2400 volumes, a wide range of journals, and access to IEEE, DELNET, and other digital resources for engineering, management, architecture, and IT programs. Hostels are located on campus with secure access, providing accommodation for both b...

reviews.review_heading: It's all good and the best.
reviews.review_text: All good, but need to be better, and one thing which I also notice is that it's improving day by day. The management also saw that they needed to improve, so they implemented the procedure, and they are trying their best, but the quality in the hostel is, although good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, and good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very good for my course. We have Wi-Fi connections, computer labs with good working systems, and a library with many reference and other books. The facilities in the hostel are good. As I am not from the hostel, I have heard from my friends that the food quality, sports and games, and medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements and supportive faculty, with vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course at Poornima University is quite modern, with a Wi-Fi-enabled campus, well-equipped computer labs, digital classrooms, and a central library that provides access to both books and e-resources. The hostel facilities are decent, with clean rooms and 24/7 security.

reviews.review_heading: Good for the economic family.
reviews.review_text: Almost everything is available here; sometimes you find it sufficient, sometimes not. Almost, they have all the things that you want, not so, but so. They have a gym, football ground, American football ground, and central park; it's like a semi-event area, and currently, they are expanding their campus and infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average and not worth as per the fee it charges.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities require significant improvement. Washrooms are hygienic and poorly maintained, which affects daily comfort and sanitation. Additionally, the Wi-Fi connectivity is unreliable, disrupting online activities and communication. The quality of food provided is also subpar and lacks consistency in taste and nutrition. Overall, these issues impact the living experience and need immediate attention.

reviews.review_heading: Poornima University - Just another tier 3 college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is top-notch. AC computer labs are assigned in place of traditional lecture halls. Every student has their own assigned PC. Talking about mess, food is satisfactory and quality and hygiene are maintained well. Sports exposure is great too, regular trials are conducted for university teams. Campus has courts for sports like tennis, pickleball, football, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with the environment and fests. Infrastructure development is a little annoying.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good, but the food in the mess is below average. However, overall it can be taken. I can't comment on hygiene, as the food is prepared elsewhere and then brought to the college. The classrooms are good, and the big library is pretty good.

reviews.review_heading: I opted for this college because of good and helpful faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Everything is perfect; the lab is well-equipped, with excellent air conditioning. The teachers are good, and the hostel is satisfactory, though the student population is a concern. All sports are available, such as cricket, tennis, basketball, etc., and I am happy to recommend them.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with my college as it has good faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure available is good. Labs are too good with AC, and the new block and open stage stadium are being created.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with infrastructure and faculty. Great learning, average placements, and fun events.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are best for girls, especially since rooms are highly maintained. The washrooms are super clean. However, the boys' hostel is not the same as the girls, their washrooms are not in healthy condition. The mess food is average. The medical facilities are the best. They provide sports activities in the evening, which are open to hostellers and day scholars.

reviews.review_heading: Best private college within budget with decent placements.
reviews.review_text: There is a dedicated computer lab for the whole day for B.Tech, BCA, and MCA students. Classrooms are pretty decent, and the academic block is nice. There is a need for improvement in hostel food and infrastructure. There is serious development and construction ongoing to make a new academic building and hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc and A.H) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It has a good infrastructure and many placements.

review_content.Placements: Placement depends on the government. Students can get a job in the private sector with a salary of Rs. 40,000 per month. Students with merit are joining this college, but seats are very few. It is a government university. Almost 65% of the students get a government job if they study in this institution.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is well-maintained and good. Medical facilities are not good, but sports and games are well-maintained. Students are encouraged to play in inter-university. Hostel food is good, and a students' mess is available. The canteen is not at all good.

reviews_list.review_title: Really good facilities and education.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement available in this college as it was founded in 2015 and students are doing great in higher education after quality from this college. Students do get internship opportunities from the college as it offers Letter of recommendation.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure has all the necessities including Wi-Fi and labs, classrooms, library. Hostels are well maintained and the food is well served with all the hygiene maintenance. Medical facilities are all provided and the college's is also actively participating over a wide range of sports and completion.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good infrastructure, teaching, studies, and knowledge.

review_content.Placements: Minimum students get placed from our college and get internships in companies and industries in well pharmaceutical research. Salary packages offered are average and roles offered in our colleges are to gain the knowledge and research.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. We have free Wi-Fi for students and staff to gain knowledge. Labs are good for the practice. Quality of the hostel is average, and medical facilities are good. In sports, the college has high priority.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It provides good education, care and infrastructure. I am satisfied with the education quality.

review_content.Placements: Not less than 50% of the students from our course were placed. The salary offered ranges according to your dedication to work. However, the highest salary package offered was 2 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 1.2 LPA. The top recruiting companies of our college are Cipla and Zydex Industries. Top roles offered to the students are assistant, drug inspector, and students even set up their own medical store.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is beautiful. Free Wi-Fi is available on every floor and in every classroom. Labs are well-equipped and maintained according to pharmaceutical standard, and classrooms are divided in a way to give maximum attention to the students. The library is useful even for competitive exams, and sports and games are celebrated with utmost dedication. The hostel is equipped with many facilities such as recreation hall, mess and sports equipment along with a generator for electricity backup. Mess food is healthy, and the coordinator is very supportive.

overview_faqs.question: Is Sir Dr. M.S. Gosavi College of Pharmaceutical Education and Research a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Sir Dr. M.S. Gosavi College of Pharmaceutical Education and Research is a well-known institution for D.Pharma, B.Pharma, M.Pharma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Sir Dr. M.S. Gosavi College of Pharmaceutical Education and Research has a rating of 3.8 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.8 on campuslife, 2.9 on placements, 4.6 on faculty and 3.6 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Sir Dr. M.S. Gosavi College of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of facilities, good placements, and support.

content.Placements: The placement cell of the college is very good. All staff members are very supportive and promote students to the recent and trending fields of the pharma background. Our college placed many students from our bachelors to many renowned companies like TCS, Vatsal, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are provided to students with all required access and training associated with the machines. All chemicals are available in the college which are required for practicals and other exam purposes. The infrastructure of the college is very good. All facilities are available to us. Our college has proper labs with good and professional technicians. They support students in every possible way. There is a sophisticated lab for HPLC. UV and IR are very clean and maintained. Our college maintains its hygiene as a top priority thing.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college affiliated with the top university in Maharashtra.

content.Placements: I am a second-year student of B.Pharma, so I don't have much more idea about the placement of our college. But seniors from our college always tell us that placements are much better than other colleges in Nashik. In the last year, 60% of students choose m pharma and other higher education.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available for free use. Labs are good, clean, and well maintained. All chemicals and glasswares are available, all safety machines are available. A canteen is not available at college. Library and a lot of pharma books are available. A huge playground is available for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Really good facilities and education.

content.Placements: There is no placement available in this college as it was founded in 2015 and students are doing great in higher education after quality from this college. Students do get internship opportunities from the college as it offers Letter of recommendation.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure has all the necessities including Wi-Fi and labs, classrooms, library. Hostels are well maintained and the food is well served with all the hygiene maintenance. Medical facilities are all provided and the college's is also actively participating over a wide range of sports and completion.
