college_info.college_name: Indala Institute of Pharmacy: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Cutoff, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Indala Institute of Pharmacy:

review_content.Placements: Almost 60-80% of students are admitted to our college. Right now, I am not aware of the package. There are many well-known companies in my course, eg. Cipla. You don't have words for how many roles we can play in this course. Medicine making, Packaging, and Dispensing.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are both maintained nicely. All the Wi-Fi works best. Labs have all the equipment. Classrooms are well-maintained. Library is huge and all the books are kept in their best state. Facilities are so good and humble. The food quality can be low, but medical facilities are good. Only Problem is that the hospital is a little far. Sports and games are a part of our college, along with studies. We have a strong motivation for sports, we have a huge ground, and different sports are well played.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college and regret my decision to take admission .

review_content.Placements: As a final-year student, I can clearly say that there is no placement for pharmacy students till now. Moreover, the companies that came earlier were customer service provider-based companies, which were totally irrelevant to the field students are studying.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good, but ventilation is poor. Only 1 floor is provided with Wi-Fi. Labs are not equipped. The library is good; also, the librarian is well-spoken and helpful. There is no hostel available, also no medical facilities available. Sports and games are only arranged during annual functions.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the placements.

review_content.Placements: Our college is providing placements but not in reputed multinational companies, they just provide you placements in local companies or industries. It's better to search for a job yourself if you believe that you have a lot of skills and it is okay for you to go for other opportunities better than the college. But if you are not eligible enough, the college will really help you with the placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi facility and labs having all the apparatuses with chemical and medicines required for Pharma students. The water supply from the tap basin in the lab is leaked and we can't use most of the taps because of leakage, otherwise everything is okay.

The facilities and infrastructure are both maintained nicely. All the Wi-Fi works best. Labs have all the equipment. Classrooms are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi facility and labs having all the apparatuses with chemical and medicines required for Pharma students. The water supply from the tap basin in the lab is leaked and we can't use most of the taps because of leakage, otherwise everything is okay.

The university conducts its own entrance exam for admission. However, those with a valid score in national-level entrances, such as MAT/ CAT/ XAT/ CMAT exams are exempted from this test provided they have a score of 75 percentile and above. Those who qualify one of the afore-mentioned exams are required to go through a GDPI round for final selection. Before everything else, students must meet with the minimum eligibility criteria set by the university which is to pass a relevant undergraduate degree with at least 50% aggregate. However, those who are in the final year of their UG degree can also apply provided they have no arrears in the previous semesters and fulfill the complete eligibility before first semester exams.

overview_faqs.question: Is MBA available at Guwahati University?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Gauhati University offers a two-year MBA programme across four specialisations, namely Marketing, Finance, HR, Production. Spread over four semesters, admissions to MBA at GU starts in the month of March and the final shortlist is released in the months of May-June. The course is inclusive of a 60-day internship/ in-plant training for them to learn the basics of solving real life problems in business/ industrial organisations. The programme is under full sponsorship of UGC and is recognised by AICTE. Admission to MBA is completely entrance-based. The university conducts its own entrance exam for admission to MBA. However, those with a valid score in the national-level entrance exams are exempted from the university-level tests and are forwarded directly for other selection rounds. Read more about MBA colleges in India.

overview_faqs.question: Why choose Guwahati University?
overview_faqs.answer: Established in 1948, Guwahati University is accredited with A Grade by NAAC and is approved by UGC and AICTE. It has over 302 colleges and various departments. It offers UG, PG, diploma, and various other courses in Arts, Law, Science, Management, Engineering, and various other streams.

review_summary.college_name: Gauhati University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied with my college. Its teachers are very good and supportive.

content.Placements: Mostly, students are placed in my course. The average package is 6 LPA, with a max of 24 LPA and a min of 4 LPA. Overall, the placement environment is good. Only focus students need to do is focus on their skills and improve them, and also a good CGPA is very important in placement. Companies like PSU, IOCL, NRL, L&T.
content.Infrastructure: We have almost all the facilities in our college, including GYM, Library, Computer Lab, Machines Lab, Embedded Systems Lab, and all other department labs. We also have a park and a canteen. Recently in 2026, our canteen has been under FATBELLY, due to which the food quality is very good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college in terms of the faculty.

content.Placements: 50 percent of students are placed, with the highest package of 5 LPA and an average package of 3 LPA to 2 LPA. The top recruiting companies are NRL and other companies. Almost 90 percent of the students get a free internship in different companies. Top roles offered are manager, salesman, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average with a vintage look. There is no Wi-Fi, and the classrooms are not that updated. The library is the most updated place in the college. The hostel is not that good in terms of food and cleanliness, but according to the price, it is good.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no placements provided, overall, good infrastructure.

content.Placements: No placements provided by the college, as the college is a government college, but the commerce department is not funded by the government, it's privately funded, and so the college doesn't offer any placement opportunities, as no companies participate here for hiring because the college doesn't offer any such opportunities or doesn't meet the requirements for this.

admission_overview.title: Guwahati University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Guwahati University's admission process is completely online, and for a majority of its courses, it is subject to candidates' performance in an entrance test conducted by the university. Guwahati University is a public state university that started with 18 affiliated colleges and 8 Post Graduate Departments in 1948. It offers UG, PG, diploma, certificate, and doctoral courses via its departments and constituent colleges and 325 affiliated colleges. At the campus, the university offers only postgraduate courses while all the other UG, Diploma, Certificate, and PhD courses are offered via its constituent and affiliated colleges. It also has an Institute of Distance and Open Learning (IDOL) to offer distance learning programmes to students. In order to apply to Gauhati University, visit the official site of the university, apply online, and complete the application form. In undergraduate education, admission is usually done on the basis of CUET or a merit list, whereas in BTech, JEE Mains scores are taken into consideration. To pursue postgraduate studies, an applicant usually has to pass an entrance examination and have an interview or counselling. Once you have applied, you might be asked to download a fee challan and pay.

faqs.question: Is admission to Gauhati University merit-based or entrance-based?
faqs.answer: Gauhati University offers admissions on the basis of merit and entrance, both. The university requires entrance exam including CAT, XAT, MAT, CMAT, CUET, Assam CEE, JEE Main, NEET PG, GATE, Asaam JMEE, Andhra Pradesh PECET, etc. to offer admission to the courses. To get admission to Gauhati University, candidates must fulfil the course-specific eligibility.

paragraphs: The placement drive for the 2024 season at Guwahati University has ended, but the placement report is still pending.However, Guwahati University Institute of Science and Technology placement brochure has been released. As per the brochure. The highest package recorded at GUIST was INR 12 LPA . The average and the median package recorded during GUIST placements 2024 was INR 7.35 LPA and INR 6.42 LPA. In contrast, the NIRF report for 2025 has been published. A total of 592 students achieved placements during Guwahati University placements 2024.

faqs: At what JEE Main rank will I get admission in Gauhati University?
Can I get a seat at Gauhati University with 25000 rank?
What is the JEE Main cutoff for admission to various courses at Gauhati Univeristy?
description: Gauhati University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to the B.Tech. course across multiple specialisations. Candidates can check out the sections below to view the cutoff details. Other exam-related events are below:

Guwahati University BTech cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the cutoff list. In the last round, the closing ranks were in the range of 135297 and 559777, with CSE being the most competitive for admission. The first-round closing rank for the same specialisation was 50806, for the students belonging to the General AI quota. To view the JEE Main first and last-round closing ranks of all the BTech specialisations for the General AI quota students, refer to the table below:

Gauhati University JEE Main cutoff 2025 was released for admission to the B.Tech. course. For the General AI category, the last round closing ranks varied between 135297 and 559777. Among all the BTech courses, the most challenging was Computer Science Engineering, followed by Electronics and Communication Engineering and Instrumentation Engineering.

Guwahati University BTech admission is based on candidates' performance in the JEE Main entrance exam, followed by the counselling process. Students preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view the important JEE Main 2026 dates:

Candidates who appeared for the JEE Main entrance exam, followed by the counselling rounds, can check out the table below to view or download the consolidated rounds and year-wise JEE Main cutoff PDFs. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

highlights.description: Gauhati University is one of India’s top institutes. Eminent national ranking bodies have acknowledged it as a leading institute. As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #52 in the Overall category, #33 under University, and #9 under State Public University. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in Gauhati University rankings.

rankings.highlight: 2nd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Assam In 2025

nirf.description:
Gauhati University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Gauhati University climbed 5 ranks to #52 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated an increasing trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Gauhati University climbed 7 ranks to #33 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has shown an increasing trend in the 'State Public University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Gauhati University climbed 4 ranks to #9 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the Gauhati University latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:
Read less

qs_world.description:
Gauhati University has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankings for Gauhati University indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings. It has been seen that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2026, Gauhati University fell 150 ranks to #851 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Gauhati University fell 52 ranks to #274 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

facilities: Library and hostel facilities for both boys and girls
Well-equipped conference hall and seminar hall

data: Library, Cafeteria, Hostel, Labs, Auditorium, Seminar Halls, Research centres, Medical services, Food Courts, Canteens, GU Community Radio Service, etc.

library.description: The University's Krishna Kant Handiqui library has a collection of  269369 books, 34495 volumes of bound periodicals, 3704 theses, 4500 manuscripts. It has a sitting capacity of 200 people and facility of reprographical section.

library.description: The University's Krishna Kant Handiqui library has a collection of  269369 books, 34495 volumes of bound periodicals, 3704 theses, 4500 manuscripts. It has a sitting capacity of 200 people and facility of reprographical section.

hostel.description: The University has 23 hostels (12 girls hostel and 11 boys hostel) including two hostels (each one for boys and girls) for research scholars. All the hostels have basic amenities equipped in them for use of students.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab, Instrumentation Lab, Geology Lab

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Assam Engineering CollegeReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with my college. Its teachers are very good and supportive.
reviews.review_text: We have almost all the facilities in our college, including GYM, Library, Computer Lab, Machines Lab, Embedded Systems Lab, and all other department labs. We also have a park and a canteen. Recently in 2026, our canteen has been under FATBELLY, due to which the food quality is very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by B Borooah CollegeReviewed on 9 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in terms of the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average with a vintage look. There is no Wi-Fi, and the classrooms are not that updated. The library is the most updated place in the college. The hostel is not that good in terms of food and cleanliness, but according to the price, it is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Barnagar CollegeReviewed on 18 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: An overwhelming experience with nature and studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and overall ambience of the college were very good. The campus was in the midst of nature, which provided a very pleasant environment for studying. The labs, classrooms and libraries were well maintained. Some of the classrooms were still in a transition phase from old to new smart classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Reference volumes, legal case studies, and every resource are available in our library itself.
reviews.review_text: It is mandatory to follow the dress code suggested by the management, especially for the law. Moot court halls and other research rooms are initiated on the campus. For any references, legal case studies, and other volumes, all the resources are available in the campus library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Pragjyotish CollegeReviewed on 29 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no placements provided, overall, good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college offered pretty decent facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, a library, basketball courts, a canteen, parking facilities, and a volleyball court as well. The quality of the canteen is very good as there are many dishes served along with a live Maggi and coffee centre by Nestle just next to the library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Pragjyotish CollegeReviewed on 29 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is average. The course that I am pursuing is very costly
reviews.review_text: The facilities for the course are average. The classrooms are good, and the labs are also good. The library is very good because the books they have are excellent. The quality of the hostel facilities is good, and the food they provide is average.

reviews.review_heading: I chose M.A. in Mathematics instead of M.Sc. in Mathematics.
reviews.review_text: Gawhati University is a popular university and produces thousands of talents in every single new batch. Along with the highly spacious mess, a cafeteria is also present. The arrangements of alumni gatherings every year create a higher reach to the university. The addition of sports is a necessary physical activity in their schedule.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Assam Engineering CollegeReviewed on 28 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements in the upcoming years.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is neither good nor bad compared to other colleges. It is average. Since it is the first engineering college of the North-east, the infrastructure should be top-notch. Labs are available, and the lab teachers are very experienced.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Nazir Ajmal Memorial College of EducationReviewed on 26 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Our college was established in 2014.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Every department has its own separate classroom. Every classroom has free Wi-Fi. Every department has its lab. We have one library. The quality of food in the message. Good content is a very clean canteen. We have sports week.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Bongaigaon CollegeReviewed on 29 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is so great.
reviews.review_text: Our college has many facilities like hostel, canteen, gym, garden, fields, labs, library, and many other things. In hostel, we have a small garden and we enjoyed a lot with our hostel mates and with seniors too. Our college canteen is also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by NEF Law CollegeReviewed on 30 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A good college and worth studying.
reviews.review_text: The building is good, but we don't have a campus to roam around. Only the building itself is where we can spend our days and even take a break. There is no canteen to eat at, but we can eat at a nearby restaurant. We have a library with AC. No place for sports and games, but we used to have moot court, debate, etc. We don't have a hostel, we have to stay at the nearby PG or rent a house.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by B Borooah CollegeReviewed on 25 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My experience with B. Borooah College.
reviews.review_text: It's somehow good. Department has good LED screens, and Wi-Fi setup which helps the students to learn anything. Hostel, canteen, and sports all are above average. Library offers very quality books, both college and department. Various types of books are available especially on science and tech.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Assam Engineering CollegeReviewed on 22 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Our 1st engineering college in the entire North East India.
reviews.review_text: In our department, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are all available. The quality of the faculty is very good, and the food is also very good and fresh. We have a total of 9 hostels, each of which has Wi-Fi. Our college environment is also good. College provides us with all types of sports equipment. In each hostel, there is a big playground.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by K.C. Das Commerce CollegeReviewed on 14 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Kind of satisfied with the college and the faculty, everything is balanced as of now.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided in classes are good. The infrastructure and college campus are good as well. There are many new facilities provided in the college, and it’s quite good. The classrooms are good. But there is no hostel for the college students. If you want to study here, there is no option for a hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by K.C. Das Commerce CollegeReviewed on 14 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good for quality studies, but it is not for sports advancement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also kind of average. In the class, there are 6 fans and a screen TV for studies. The classroom is also kind of average, but the studies from the experienced teachers you will get is kind of worth it. So, you can take the college in KC Das.

college_info.college_name: Gauhati University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Gauhati University offers various scholarships to undergraduate and postgraduate students as financial assistance. Gauhati University offers various scholarships through the National Scholarship Scheme. Under this scholarship scheme, undergraduate and postgraduate students are awarded Minority Scholarships and Merit Cum-Means Scholarships.
